items.title: Clinical and pulmonary function-based identification of HRCT-confirmed rheumatoid arthritis-associated interstitial lung disease.
items.abstract: To evaluate a pragmatic clinical and pulmonary function-based model for identifying high-resolution computed tomography (HRCT)-confirmed rheumatoid arthritis-associated interstitial lung disease (RA-ILD) in RA patients selected for chest CT evaluation and to explore, as a secondary aim, whether lung ultrasound adds diagnostic information in a selected subset. This retrospective diagnostic accuracy study screened rheumatoid arthritis (RA) patients who had undergone chest HRCT or thin-section computed tomography. HRCT-confirmed RA-ILD was the reference outcome. Candidate predictors were prespecified according to clinical plausibility and prior RA-ILD literature, without automated variable selection or univariable P-value screening. The primary model combined clinical variables with forced vital capacity (FVC) and diffusing capacity for carbon monoxide (DLCO). Model performance was assessed using the area under the receiver operating characteristic curve (AUC), diagnostic accuracy indices, calibration, decision curve analysis, bootstrap internal validation with 1000 resamples, and additional sensitivity analyses. The lung ultrasound-enhanced model was considered exploratory. Of 554 screened RA patients with chest HRCT or thin-section CT records, 486 were included in the final HRCT analysis cohort, of whom 149 had HRCT-confirmed RA-ILD. The PFT analysis cohort included 273 patients, with 96 RA-ILD cases. In the PFT cohort, the clinical plus PFT model showed good discrimination for HRCT-confirmed RA-ILD (AUC 0.860, 95% CI 0.814-0.904), with sensitivity 79.2%, specificity 77.4%, positive predictive value 65.5%, and negative predictive value 87.3% at an exploratory Youden-derived threshold. Bootstrap internal validation with 1000 resamples yielded an optimism-corrected AUC of 0.844 and a median calibration slope of 0.899. Within the same PFT cohort, adding PFT variables improved the AUC from 0.805 to 0.860 (ΔAUC 0.055, DeLong P = 0.005). In the selected PFT plus lung ultrasound subset, adding lung ultrasound to the clinical plus PFT model did not significantly improve AUC (ΔAUC 0.036, P = 0.102), although the exploratory lung ultrasound-enhanced model had a high apparent AUC of 0.913. In RA patients selected for chest CT evaluation, a model combining routine clinical variables with FVC and DLCO identified HRCT-confirmed RA-ILD with good internal performance. Lung ultrasound findings should be interpreted as exploratory because of subset selection, limited sample size, and non-significant incremental AUC gain. External validation in unselected RA cohorts is required before the model can be used to guide HRCT referral decisions. Key Points • A clinical plus pulmonary function model showed good discrimination for HRCT-confirmed RA-ILD in a real-world CT-evaluated RA cohort, but the findings should not be generalized to unselected RA populations without external validation. • Pulmonary function variables improved diagnostic performance beyond clinical variables alone within the same PFT cohort. • The lung ultrasound-enhanced model showed high apparent performance but should be interpreted as exploratory because the LUS subset was selected and the incremental AUC was not statistically significant. • The findings support pragmatic risk stratification within CT-evaluated or higher-risk RA patients; lower-prevalence recalibration showed attenuated positive predictive value and net benefit in general RA screening scenarios.

items.title: Gout: a practical approach to diagnosis and management in low- and middle-income countries and resource-limited settings.
items.abstract: The prevalence of gout is increasing worldwide, with rapid rises reported in low- and middle-income countries (LMICs), particularly in parts of Asia, Latin America, and Africa. Several international organizations have published guidelines for optimal gout management, most of which are from developed countries with high-income settings. Therefore, implementing these recommendations in LMICs and other resource-limited settings (RLS) is often difficult due to several barriers. These include a shortage of rheumatologists and other relevant specialists, workforce constraints, limited access to advanced diagnostic modalities (e.g., compensated polarized light microscopy, ultrasound, and dual-energy computed tomography), restricted availability and affordability of newer effective therapies, as well as limited access to HLA-B*58:01 testing before initiating allopurinol in at-risk populations. As a result, gout care in these settings may be suboptimal. This review summarizes these barriers and proposes pragmatic, context-appropriate strategies to address them. It emphasizes targeted education and the development of multidisciplinary gout care teams, including primary care physicians, nurses, and pharmacists, who deliver most gout care in LMICs/RLS. It also outlines structured collaboration with higher-level facilities (e.g., through teleconsultation and case conferences) to support difficult cases and strengthen referral pathways. National rheumatology societies and health authorities should adapt international guidelines to local constraints and establish reimbursement or authorization pathways for high-cost urate lowering therapy not included in essential drug lists. In addition, trained community health workers can support gout care by identifying people with gout, providing basic education, promoting regular follow-up, facilitating access to appropriate care, and correcting misconceptions about gout. Key Points • LMIC/RLS gout care is limited by diagnostic capacity and management constraints, especially workforce shortages. • Collaboration among higher-level facilities, rheumatology societies, and health authorities is key to improving gout management. • International guidelines should be adapted to local constraints in LMICs/RLS.

items.titleZh: 痛风：中低收入国家和资源有限环境中诊断与管理的实用方法
items.abstractZh: 痛风的患病率在全球范围内不断增加，据报道在中低收入国家（LMICs）迅速上升，特别是在亚洲、拉丁美洲和非洲的部分地区。多个国际组织已发布痛风最佳管理指南，其中大部分来自高收入发达国家。因此，由于若干障碍，这些建议在LMICs和其他资源有限环境（RLS）中实施往往困难。这些障碍包括风湿病学家和其他相关专家短缺、劳动力限制、先进诊断手段（如补偿偏振光显微镜、超声和双能计算机断层扫描）可及性有限、新型有效疗法的可及性和可负担性受限，以及在风险人群启动别嘌醇治疗前进行HLA-B*58:01检测的可及性有限。因此，这些环境中的痛风护理可能不理想。本综述总结了这些障碍，并提出了务实的、因地制宜的策略来应对这些障碍。它强调有针对性的教育和多学科痛风护理团队的发展，包括初级保健医生、护士和药剂师，他们在LMICs/RLS中提供大部分痛风护理。它还概述了与更高级别设施的结构化协作（例如通过远程会诊和病例讨论），以支持疑难病例并加强转诊路径。国家风湿病学会和卫生当局应使国际指南适应当地限制，并为未列入基本药物清单的高成本降尿酸治疗建立报销或授权路径。此外，经过培训的社区卫生工作者可以通过识别痛风患者、提供基本教育、促进定期随访、促进获得适当护理以及纠正对痛风的误解来支持痛风护理。关键点 • LMIC/RLS的痛风护理受到诊断能力和管理限制的制约，尤其是劳动力短缺。 • 更高级别设施、风湿病学会和卫生当局之间的合作是改善痛风管理的关键。 • 国际指南应适应LMICs/RLS的当地限制。

items.title: IL-18 Promotes the Development of Lupus Nephritis by Activating the Wnt/β-Catenin Signaling Pathway in Renal Tubular Epithelial Cells.
items.abstract: This study investigates the specific role of interleukin-18 (IL-18) in lupus nephritis (LN) progression and its molecular mechanisms to provide a theoretical basis for the pathological intervention of LN. IL-18 levels were measured from systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) patients with or without LN. MRL/lpr mice received intraperitoneal injection of IL-18 or its inhibitor to assess renal injury, inflammation, and Wnt/β-catenin pathway activity. In-vivo intervention experiments using Caspase-1 inhibitor (Ac-YVAD-CMK), Wnt pathway agonists (BML-284), and inhibitors (IWR-1-endo) were performed. In-vitro studies were conducted in human renal tubular epithelial cell line HK-2 to investigate the molecular mechanisms. IL-18 was markedly elevated in SLE patients, and further increased in urine and renal tissue of LN. In MRL/lpr mice, exogenous IL-18 significantly exacerbated renal injury, evidenced by increased urinary protein, serum creatinine, anti-dsDNA antibodies, tubulointerstitial inflammation, and increased activity index. This was accompanied by up-regulation of IFN-γ, IL-1β, IL-6, down-regulation of IL-10, and activation of the Wnt/β-catenin pathway (increased β-catenin, p-GSK-3β, and CK1α). Conversely, IL-18 blockade or Wnt inhibition attenuated these pathological changes. Notably, the protective effects of IL-18 inhibition were reversed by simultaneous Wnt activation. In-vitro, IL-18 promoted HK-2 cell proliferation and inflammatory secretion by activating Wnt/β-catenin signaling, effects which were blocked by a Caspase-1 inhibitor or a Wnt pathway inhibitor. IL-18 activated the Wnt/β-catenin signaling pathway in renal tubular epithelial cells and disrupted the balance of pro- and anti-inflammatory cytokine networks, thereby exacerbating tubulointerstitial inflammation and promoting renal injury in LN mice. These findings highlight the therapeutic potential of targeting the IL-18 signaling pathway in LN. Trial registration: Not applicable.

items.titleZh: IL-18通过激活肾小管上皮细胞中的Wnt/β-catenin信号通路促进狼疮肾炎的发展
items.abstractZh: 本研究探讨了白细胞介素-18（IL-18）在狼疮肾炎（LN）进展中的具体作用及其分子机制，为LN的病理干预提供理论基础。检测了伴或不伴LN的系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）患者的IL-18水平。MRL/lpr小鼠腹腔注射IL-18或其抑制剂，评估肾损伤、炎症和Wnt/β-catenin通路活性。进行了Caspase-1抑制剂（Ac-YVAD-CMK）、Wnt通路激动剂（BML-284）和抑制剂（IWR-1-endo）的体内干预实验。在体外，使用人肾小管上皮细胞系HK-2研究分子机制。IL-18在SLE患者中显著升高，并在LN患者的尿液和肾组织中进一步升高。在MRL/lpr小鼠中，外源性IL-18显著加重肾损伤，表现为尿蛋白、血清肌酐、抗dsDNA抗体、肾小管间质炎症增加以及活动指数升高。同时伴有IFN-γ、IL-1β、IL-6上调，IL-10下调，以及Wnt/β-catenin通路激活（β-catenin、p-GSK-3β和CK1α增加）。相反，IL-18阻断或Wnt抑制可减轻这些病理变化。值得注意的是，IL-18抑制的保护作用被同时进行的Wnt激活所逆转。在体外，IL-18通过激活Wnt/β-catenin信号促进HK-2细胞增殖和炎症分泌，这些效应可被Caspase-1抑制剂或Wnt通路抑制剂阻断。IL-18激活肾小管上皮细胞中的Wnt/β-catenin信号通路，破坏促炎和抗炎细胞因子网络的平衡，从而加剧肾小管间质炎症，促进LN小鼠的肾损伤。这些发现强调了靶向IL-18信号通路在LN中的治疗潜力。试验注册：不适用。

items.title: Bilateral knee lipoma arborescens mimicking persistent inflammatory arthritis in a patient with psoriatic arthritis.
items.abstract: Lipoma arborescens is a rare intra-articular lesion typically associated with chronic monoarthritis. We report on a man in his 40s with psoriatic arthritis, well controlled with secukinumab, who developed chronic bilateral knee effusion and soft, non-tender suprapatellar masses over several years despite low systemic disease activity. Magnetic resonance (MR) imaging revealed frond-like fatty proliferation with effusion, which was confirmed as lipoma arborescens on histopathology. Bilateral synovectomy restored full knee extension and improved mobility and function. MR imaging is an excellent non-invasive tool to diagnose persistent knee swelling, guide management and prevent long-term complications.

items.titleZh: 双侧膝关节树枝状脂肪瘤模仿银屑病关节炎患者的持续性炎症性关节炎
items.abstractZh: 树枝状脂肪瘤是一种罕见的关节内病变，通常与慢性单关节炎相关。我们报告一名40多岁男性银屑病关节炎患者，使用司库奇尤单抗控制良好，尽管全身疾病活动度低，但数年来出现慢性双侧膝关节积液和柔软、无痛的髌上肿块。磁共振（MR）成像显示绒毛状脂肪增生伴积液，组织病理学证实为树枝状脂肪瘤。双侧滑膜切除术恢复了膝关节完全伸展，并改善了活动能力和功能。MR成像是诊断持续性膝关节肿胀、指导治疗和预防长期并发症的极佳非侵入性工具。

items.title: Infection risk in rheumatoid arthritis patients treated with biologic and targeted synthetic DMARDs: prediction models and use of machine learning.
items.abstract: Infection risk is an important consideration during treatment decision-making in rheumatoid arthritis (RA), including at the initiation of biologics or targeted synthetic disease-modifying anti-rheumatic drugs. A number of risk prediction models for serious infection associated with RA treatment currently exist, derived from different patient populations and using conventional statistical approaches. This review describes and compares current prediction models, evaluates their limitations, and explores the potential of machine learning (ML) to enhance current risk prediction. Important aspects related to ML application, including data accuracy, validation and generalizability, interpretability, and legal and regulatory approval, are discussed.

items.titleZh: 接受生物制剂和靶向合成DMARDs治疗的类风湿关节炎患者的感染风险：预测模型与机器学习应用
items.abstractZh: 感染风险是类风湿关节炎（RA）治疗决策中的重要考虑因素，包括在启动生物制剂或靶向合成改善病情抗风湿药时。目前存在多种针对RA治疗相关严重感染的预测模型，这些模型源自不同的患者群体，并采用常规统计方法。本综述描述并比较了当前的预测模型，评估了其局限性，并探讨了机器学习（ML）增强当前风险预测的潜力。讨论了与ML应用相关的重要方面，包括数据准确性、验证与泛化性、可解释性以及法律和监管批准。

items.title: Hierarchical alterations of brain network coupling and its clinical and cognitive relevance in systemic lupus erythematosus.
items.abstract: Brain network alterations are common in systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE), but the coupling between structural and functional networks remains unclear. To investigate hierarchical alterations in structural-functional coupling (SFC) and their relationships with cognition and serological markers, we enrolled 63 female patients with SLE and 68 healthy controls who underwent multimodal MRI and neuropsychological assessment. Structural and functional networks were parcellated using the Schaefer-200 atlas and organized into seven Yeo functional systems. Structural connections were classified as rich-club, feeder, or local, and SFC was quantified at the whole-brain, network, and hierarchical levels. Principal component analysis of laboratory immune measures summarized the dominant covariance patterns in the humoral and antiphospholipid-related marker sets. Compared with the controls, the SLE patients showed reduced whole-brain SFC and decreased coupling within the default mode and frontoparietal networks. A hierarchical analysis revealed reductions in both the rich-club and local SFCs. The antiphospholipid-related component correlated negatively with the DMN and local SFCs. Specific serological indices, including anti-RNP and IgG, were associated with network-level SFC alterations, and reduced DMN SFC was associated with lower MMSE scores. Support vector regression models showed significant predictive associations of altered SFC features with cognitive scores and selected laboratory indices. These findings indicate multilevel disruption of structure-function correspondence in SLE, particularly in higher-order networks and hierarchical backbone connections, and suggest that SFC may provide a useful framework for linking immune dysregulation to brain network dysfunction and cognitive impairment.

items.titleZh: 系统性红斑狼疮脑网络耦合的层级性改变及其临床和认知相关性
items.abstractZh: 脑网络改变在系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）中常见，但结构网络与功能网络之间的耦合仍不清楚。为研究结构-功能耦合（SFC）的层级性改变及其与认知和血清学标志物的关系，我们招募了63名女性SLE患者和68名健康对照，进行了多模态MRI和神经心理学评估。使用Schaefer-200图谱划分结构和功能网络，并组织成七个Yeo功能系统。结构连接被分类为rich-club、feeder或local，并在全脑、网络和层级水平量化SFC。实验室免疫测量的主成分分析总结了体液和抗磷脂相关标志物集中的主要协方差模式。与对照组相比，SLE患者显示全脑SFC降低，以及默认模式和额顶网络内的耦合降低。层级分析显示rich-club和local SFC均降低。抗磷脂相关成分与DMN和local SFC呈负相关。特定血清学指标，包括抗RNP和IgG，与网络水平SFC改变相关，而DMN SFC降低与较低的MMSE评分相关。支持向量回归模型显示，改变的SFC特征与认知评分和选定的实验室指标存在显著的预测关联。这些发现表明SLE中结构-功能对应关系的多层级破坏，特别是在高阶网络和层级骨干连接中，并提示SFC可能为连接免疫失调与脑网络功能障碍及认知损害提供有用框架。

items.title: T peripheral helper 1 cells effectively drive atypical double-negative CD11c hi B cells to antibody-secreting cells and play a pathogenic role in systemic lupus erythematosus.
items.abstract: We investigated cytokine expression patterns and B cell-helper functions of T peripheral helper (Tph) cell subsets. CXCR3 + CCR6 - Tph1 cells have ability to co-produce interleukin (IL)-21 and interferon-γ while CXCR3 - CCR6 + Tph17 can co-produce IL-21 and IL-17 A. These Tph subsets show almost comparable activity to induce plasma cell differentiation from CD19 + B cells. Noticeably, Tph1 cells can drive plasma cell differentiation from CD11c hi double negative (DN) B cells more effectively than classical memory B cells via IL-21. On the other hand, Tph17 cells appear to have low activity to induce plasma cell differentiation from CD11c hi DN B cells. Furthermore, in new-onset patients with systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE), Tph1 cells are expanded in the blood and positively correlated with disease activity, autoantibody levels, and CD11c hi B cells. These results suggest that extrafollicular interaction between Tph1 cells and atypical CD11c hi DN B cells plays a pathogenic role in new-onset SLE.

items.titleZh: 外周辅助性T细胞1有效驱动非典型双阴性CD11c高表达B细胞分化为抗体分泌细胞并在系统性红斑狼疮中发挥致病作用
items.abstractZh: 我们研究了外周辅助性T细胞（Tph）亚群的细胞因子表达模式和B细胞辅助功能。CXCR3+CCR6-的Tph1细胞能够共同产生白细胞介素（IL）-21和干扰素-γ，而CXCR3-CCR6+的Tph17细胞能够共同产生IL-21和IL-17A。这些Tph亚群在诱导CD19+B细胞分化为浆细胞方面表现出几乎相当的活性。值得注意的是，Tph1细胞通过IL-21比经典记忆B细胞更有效地驱动CD11c高表达双阴性（DN）B细胞分化为浆细胞。另一方面，Tph17细胞在诱导CD11c高表达DN B细胞分化为浆细胞方面活性较低。此外，在新发系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）患者中，血液中Tph1细胞扩增，并与疾病活动性、自身抗体水平和CD11c高表达B细胞呈正相关。这些结果表明，Tph1细胞与非典型CD11c高表达DN B细胞之间的滤泡外相互作用在新发SLE中发挥致病作用。

items.title: When and how chronicity develops in rheumatoid arthritis: towards a temporal and tissue-integrated perspective.
items.abstract: Although the diagnosis of rheumatoid arthritis can usually be made once clinical arthritis appears, this moment does not represent the biological onset of disease. Rheumatoid arthritis develops over a period of years in preclinical phases that precede the emergence of persistent joint inflammation. In this narrative Review, we examine how chronicity develops along this trajectory by integrating temporal and tissue perspectives. We discuss early disease phases characterised by the emergence and maturation of autoimmunity and systemic inflammatory shifts, followed by stages marked by subclinical and subsequently clinical joint inflammation, in both anti-citrullinated protein antibody (ACPA)-positive and ACPA-negative rheumatoid arthritis. We consider how some immune perturbations could resolve in some individuals, while others progress to self-sustaining disease, highlighting that reversibility might differ across disease trajectories. Lastly, we examine how evolving multi-hit hypotheses, recent omics studies, and results from prevention trials inform the identification of checkpoints at which progression to chronic disease might still be modifiable.

items.title: Long-term Comparative Adherence and Switch Rates in Patients Receiving Advanced Therapies for Rheumatoid Arthritis After Use of One TNF Inhibitor.
items.abstract: Patients with rheumatoid arthritis (RA) often fail to achieve treatment targets with first-line treatment because of poor efficacy or tolerability. However, comparative long-term adherence and switching data among patients initiating a second-line therapy after a first-line tumor necrosis factor inhibitor (TNFi) remain limited. Retrospective data were from the Merative MarketScan ® claims database, August 2018-October 2024. Eligible patients were aged ≥ 18 years; diagnosed with RA; initiated upadacitinib (UPA), tofacitinib (TOF), adalimumab (ADA), etanercept (ETA), abatacept (ABA), or tocilizumab (TOC); and had discontinued a first-line TNFi within 12 months prior to index. Treatment adherence and switching outcomes were reported at 1- and 3-year follow-up. Overall, 3782 and 1182 patients were included for the 1- and 3-year analyses, respectively. The proportion of patients with adherence ≥ 80% was highest with UPA at 1-year (49.5%) and 3-year follow-up (35.7%) versus other treatments. Compared with UPA through 3 years, odds of being adherent were significantly lower for TOF (adjusted odds ratio [95% confidence interval]: 0.45 [0.29-0.71]), ADA (0.50 [0.33-0.75]), ETA (0.37 [0.24-0.58]), ABA (0.43 [0.26-0.73]), and TOC (0.46 [0.22-0.99]; p < 0.05). Switch rates were lowest for UPA versus other treatments at 1 year (28.6%) and remained lowest through 3 years (47.6%), while rates for all other treatments increased to approximately 60%. Through 3 years, patients were also significantly (p < 0.05) more likely to switch treatment when receiving TOF (adjusted hazard ratios [95% confidence interval]: 1.40 [1.07-1.84]), ADA (1.44 [1.12-1.86]), ETA (1.57 [1.21-2.03]), ABA (1.56 [1.16-2.10]), and TOC (1.54 [1.03-2.32]) compared with UPA. Median 3-year time to switch was not reached for UPA and was 528-660 days for all other treatments. Among patients with RA who discontinued a first-line TNFi, second-line UPA was associated with significantly greater long-term adherence and lower switching rates than other advanced therapies.

items.titleZh: 类风湿关节炎患者在使用一种TNF抑制剂后接受先进治疗的长期依从性和转换率比较
items.abstractZh: 类风湿关节炎（RA）患者常因疗效不佳或耐受性差而未能通过一线治疗达到治疗目标。然而，在一线肿瘤坏死因子抑制剂（TNFi）后启动二线治疗的患者中，长期依从性和转换数据的比较仍然有限。回顾性数据来自Merative MarketScan®索赔数据库，时间范围为2018年8月至2024年10月。符合条件的患者年龄≥18岁；诊断为RA；启动乌帕替尼（UPA）、托法替布（TOF）、阿达木单抗（ADA）、依那西普（ETA）、阿巴西普（ABA）或托珠单抗（TOC）；并且在索引前12个月内停用了一线TNFi。报告了1年和3年随访时的治疗依从性和转换结局。总体而言，分别有3782名和1182名患者纳入1年和3年分析。依从性≥80%的患者比例在1年（49.5%）和3年随访（35.7%）时，UPA组均高于其他治疗组。与UPA相比，3年内依从的几率显著降低：TOF（调整后比值比[95%置信区间]：0.45 [0.29-0.71]）、ADA（0.50 [0.33-0.75]）、ETA（0.37 [0.24-0.58]）、ABA（0.43 [0.26-0.73]）和TOC（0.46 [0.22-0.99]；p < 0.05）。UPA的转换率在1年时最低（28.6%），并在3年内保持最低（47.6%），而所有其他治疗组的转换率增加至约60%。在3年内，与UPA相比，接受TOF（调整后风险比[95%置信区间]：1.40 [1.07-1.84]）、ADA（1.44 [1.12-1.86]）、ETA（1.57 [1.21-2.03]）、ABA（1.56 [1.16-2.10]）和TOC（1.54 [1.03-2.32]）的患者也更可能转换治疗（p < 0.05）。UPA的3年中位转换时间未达到，而所有其他治疗组为528-660天。在停用一线TNFi的RA患者中，二线UPA与其他先进治疗相比，与显著更高的长期依从性和更低的转换率相关。

items.title: The clinical characteristics and risk factors of pulmonary arterial hypertension in primary Sjögren disease: a single-center retrospective study.
items.abstract: To summarize clinical characteristics and explore risk factors of pulmonary arterial hypertension (PAH) in patients with primary Sjögren disease (pSjD). We retrospectively collected the clinical data of 190 pSjD inpatients, who were stratified into groups with PAH (pSjD-PAH) and without PAH (pSjD-non-PAH). The differences of clinical manifestations, laboratory tests, EULAR Sjögren's Syndrome Disease Activity Index (ESSDAI) score, and transthoracic echocardiography (TTE) parameters between two groups were compared. A subgroup analysis was performed in pSjD-PAH patients according to pericardial effusion (PE) status. A total of 32 pSjD patients with PAH and 158 pSjD patients without PAH were analyzed. Patients in the pSjD-PAH group were older, with a higher incidence of mild interstitial lung disease (ILD) and diabetes (p < 0.05). They also exhibited higher levels of leukocytes, red blood cell distribution width (RDW), total bilirubin (TBIL), γ-glutamyltransferase (γ-GT), lactate dehydrogenase (LDH), and uric acid (UA) (p < 0.05). Logistic regression analysis identified mild ILD, age, and TBIL as independent risk factors for PAH in patients with pSjD. A predictive model was constructed and internally validated. In the subgroup analysis, ESSDAI score was comparable (p > 0.05), whereas values of pulmonary artery systolic pressure (PASP), pulmonary artery pressure (PA), and right atrial diameter (RAD) were higher in the PE-positive subgroup (p < 0.05). Mild ILD, age, and TBIL are identified as independent risk factors for PAH in patients with pSjD. PE formation in pSjD-PAH patients may be associated with elevated right-sided heart pressure. Key Points • Pulmonary arterial hypertension (PAH) is a common cause of death in patients with primary Sjögren disease (pSjD), and relevant studies remain limited. • PSjD patients with PAH are more likely to have pericardial effusion (PE), which may result from elevated right-sided heart pressure and subsequent venous return obstruction. • Several risk factors were identified to enable early identification of pSjD-PAH patients.

items.title: Pregnancy and lactation during anifrolumab treatment in systemic lupus erythematosus.
items.abstract: Dear Editor, Systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) is a chronic multisystem autoimmune disease that predominantly affects women of childbearing age. Cutaneous involvement represents one of the most common clinical manifestations of SLE and may occur in acute, subacute, or chronic forms. SLE disease activity can be assessed with the Systemic Lupus Erythematosus Disease Activity Index (SLEDAI) and the severity of cutaneous disease activity using the Cutaneous Lupus Erythematosus Disease Area and Severity Index (CLASI). Management of mucocutaneous SLE during pregnancy and breastfeeding remains challenging. In recent years, novel targeted therapies such as anifrolumab, a monoclonal antibody directed against the type I interferon receptor, have shown efficacy in patients with active SLE, particularly in those with prominent mucocutaneous manifestations. [...].

items.titleZh: 系统性红斑狼疮中阿尼福鲁单抗治疗期间的妊娠与哺乳
items.abstractZh: 尊敬的编辑，系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）是一种主要影响育龄女性的慢性多系统自身免疫性疾病。皮肤受累是SLE最常见的临床表现之一，可表现为急性、亚急性或慢性形式。SLE疾病活动度可通过系统性红斑狼疮疾病活动指数（SLEDAI）评估，而皮肤疾病活动严重程度则使用皮肤红斑狼疮疾病面积和严重程度指数（CLASI）评估。妊娠期和哺乳期黏膜皮肤SLE的管理仍具挑战性。近年来，新型靶向疗法如阿尼福鲁单抗（一种针对I型干扰素受体的单克隆抗体）在活动性SLE患者中显示出疗效，尤其是在具有显著黏膜皮肤表现的患者中。[...]。

items.title: Exuberant Dermatitis Herpetiformis With Oral Involvement Mimicking Behçet Disease and Disseminated Herpetic Infection: The Crucial Role of Direct Immunofluorescence.
items.abstract: Dermatitis herpetiformis (DH) is a chronic autoimmune blistering dermatosis associated with gluten-sensitive enteropathy and characterized by intensely pruritic papulovesicular eruptions, typically distributed symmetrically on extensor surfaces. Although DH classically presents with grouped vesicles and excoriated papules, atypical and exuberant manifestations may represent a substantial diagnostic challenge, frequently mimicking infectious, inflammatory, and autoimmune blistering disorders. We report the case of a 30-year-old woman presenting with a one-year history of progressive, intensely pruritic vesiculobullous and erosive lesions involving the trunk and extremities, accompanied by painful oral ulcerations, hemorrhagic crusts, extensive excoriations, secondary bacterial infection, and diffuse post-inflammatory hyperpigmentation. The patient was initially diagnosed with Behçet disease and subsequently hospitalized for suspected disseminated herpetic infection, receiving systemic corticosteroids and intravenous acyclovir without significant clinical improvement. Dermatological examination revealed widespread erosive and vesiculobullous lesions associated with severe inflammatory activity and oral aphthoid ulcerations. Histopathological examination of active lesions demonstrated intraepidermal blister formation associated with eosinophilic infiltrate and scattered acantholytic cells, findings that initially suggested alternative autoimmune blistering disorders. Direct immunofluorescence (DIF) demonstrated characteristic granular IgA deposition predominantly localized at the tips of dermal papillae, confirming the diagnosis of DH despite atypical histopathological findings. Serological evaluation further revealed positive anti-tissue transglutaminase and anti-endomysial antibodies, corroborating the diagnosis. Treatment with dapsone combined with a strict gluten-free diet resulted in marked clinical improvement. This case highlights the importance of clinicopathological and immunopathological correlation in atypical presentations of autoimmune blistering diseases and underscores the essential role of DIF in establishing the diagnosis of DH.

items.titleZh: 伴有口腔受累的过度型疱疹样皮炎模仿贝赫切特病和播散性疱疹感染：直接免疫荧光的关键作用
items.abstractZh: 疱疹样皮炎（DH）是一种与麸质敏感性肠病相关的慢性自身免疫性大疱性皮肤病，其特征为剧烈瘙痒的丘疱疹性皮疹，通常对称分布于伸侧表面。尽管DH典型表现为成簇水疱和抓痕性丘疹，但非典型和过度型表现可能构成重大诊断挑战，常模仿感染性、炎症性和自身免疫性大疱性疾病。我们报告一例30岁女性患者，有1年进行性、剧烈瘙痒的水疱大疱和糜烂性病变病史，累及躯干和四肢，伴有疼痛性口腔溃疡、出血性痂皮、广泛抓痕、继发性细菌感染和弥漫性炎症后色素沉着。患者最初被诊断为贝赫切特病，随后因疑似播散性疱疹感染住院，接受全身性皮质类固醇和静脉注射阿昔洛韦治疗，但无明显临床改善。皮肤科检查显示广泛糜烂和水疱大疱性病变，伴有严重炎症活动和口腔阿弗他样溃疡。活动性病变的组织病理学检查显示表皮内水疱形成，伴有嗜酸性粒细胞浸润和散在棘层松解细胞，这些发现最初提示其他自身免疫性大疱性疾病。直接免疫荧光（DIF）显示特征性颗粒状IgA沉积，主要位于真皮乳头尖端，尽管组织病理学发现不典型，仍确诊为DH。血清学评估进一步显示抗组织转谷氨酰胺酶和抗肌内膜抗体阳性，证实了诊断。氨苯砜联合严格无麸质饮食治疗导致显著临床改善。本病例强调了在自身免疫性大疱性疾病的非典型表现中临床病理和免疫病理相关性重要性，并强调了DIF在确诊DH中的关键作用。

items.title: Hydroxychloroquine Retinopathy in Systemic Lupus Erythematosus: Risk Factors, Screening, and Emerging Biomarkers.
items.abstract: Hydroxychloroquine (HCQ) is a cornerstone therapy for systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) because of its immunomodulatory and anti-inflammatory benefits. However, long-term exposure can cause HCQ-induced retinopathy, a potentially irreversible adverse effect in which early detection is critical. This review summarizes the literature on the reported prevalence of HCQ-related retinal toxicity in SLE, highlights consistently supported risk modifiers (including higher daily dose relative to real body weight, longer duration/cumulative exposure, and renal impairment), and synthesizes current screening strategies centered on multimodal structural and functional testing. Spectral-domain optical coherence tomography (SD-OCT), fundus autofluorescence (FAF), standard automated perimetry, and multifocal electroretinography (mfERG) are frequently emphasized as complementary tools for earlier detection, while emerging approaches such as OCT angiography-derived metrics and pharmacokinetic measures remain exploratory. Real-world screening adherence is often suboptimal, underscoring the need for implementation strategies that align dosing, risk stratification, and ophthalmic monitoring. Future work should standardize diagnostic definitions, clarify optimal screening intervals across risk strata, and prospectively validate promising biomarkers and automated screening workflows.

items.title: SLECA: A Single-Cell Atlas of Systemic Lupus Erythematosus Enabling Rare-Cell Discovery Using Graph Transformer.
items.abstract: Systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) is a complex autoimmune disease with multisystem involvement and marked interpatient heterogeneity. This heterogeneity has hindered precise characterization of the immune dysregulatory mechanisms underlying the disease. While rare immune cell populations are increasingly recognized as critical drivers of disease pathogenesis and progression, the lack of sufficiently powered, comprehensive single-cell transcriptomic resources has limited their systematic identification and characterization. To address this gap, we present SLECA, the first large-scale single-cell RNA sequencing atlas of SLE, together with a novel graph-transformer framework for the interpretable discovery and analysis of disease-relevant rare-cell populations. SLECA integrates 366 samples with standardized clinical and biological metadata, providing an atlas of SLE with a unified analytical framework. Through scalable integration and systematic analysis, SLECA resolves 54 distinct cell types, including rare populations of potential disease relevance. Notably, we identify double-negative T cells (DNTs) as a disease-expanded population whose abundance correlates with clinical severity. In silico perturbation analyses predict shifts in DNT-cell states following perturbation of JUN and EGR1, suggesting potential regulatory roles in DNT-cell transcriptional programs.

items.title: The 60 + year journey of ankylosing spondylitis from Rome criteria to today.
items.abstract: It has been more than 60 years since the development of Rome criteria for ankylosing spondylitis (AS). These criteria wonderfully delineated the clinical pictures of AS, and since then, tremendous works has paved the way for the study and management of AS patients. However, their low sensitivity, specificity and the potential for a delay diagnosis remain major problems of these criteria. Over the past six decades, new classification criteria had been developed to address these issues. As is often the case, new solutions bring new challenges. Avoiding over-diagnosis and over-treatment become a crucial contemporary issue. Hopefully, new modifications of classification criteria are on their way to better defining and treating AS patients.

items.titleZh: 强直性脊柱炎从罗马标准到今天的60余年历程
items.abstractZh: 自强直性脊柱炎（AS）的罗马标准制定以来，已有60余年。这些标准精彩地描绘了AS的临床图像，此后，大量工作为AS患者的研究和管理铺平了道路。然而，这些标准的低敏感性、特异性以及潜在的诊断延迟仍然是主要问题。在过去的六十年中，新的分类标准被开发出来以解决这些问题。通常情况下，新的解决方案带来了新的挑战。避免过度诊断和过度治疗成为当代的关键问题。希望分类标准的新修订正在更好地定义和治疗AS患者的路上。

items.title: MRI-based study of gray matter volume and cortical morphological alterations in patients with rheumatoid arthritis.
items.abstract: To investigate alterations in gray matter volume (GMV) and cortical morphology in patients with rheumatoid arthritis (RA) and examine their associations with clinical characteristics using voxel-based morphometry (VBM) and surface-based morphometry (SBM). 41 RA patients and 34 age- and sex-matched healthy controls (HCs) underwent high-resolution structural magnetic resonance imaging (sMRI). VBM was used to compare GMV, and SBM was applied to assess gyrification index (GI), cortical thickness (CT), sulcus depth (SD), and fractal dimension (FD). Whole-brain voxel/vertex-wise multiple linear regression analyses evaluated associations between structural indices and DAS28 disease activity scores, Hamilton Depression Scale (HAMD), Hamilton Anxiety Scale (HAMA), Montreal Cognitive Assessment (MoCA), C-reactive protein (CRP), Visual Analogue Scale (VAS), swollen joint count, and tender joint count. No significant group diferences were found in sex (χ 2 = 0.98, P = 0.32) and age ( t = 0.48, P = 0.14). Compared with HCs, RA patients showed reduced GMV in the bilateral putamen ( P voxel = 0.001, P cluster = 0.05; cluster size > 50), decreased SD in the left hemisphere (118 vertices: 79% left inferior frontal gyrus, opercular part; 16% lateral orbital frontal gyrus; 5% superior frontal gyrus; P = 0.0003), decreased GI in the right superior and inferior parietal gyri (65 vertices; P = 0.0004), and reduced CT in the left inferior temporal gyrus (93 vertices; P < 0.0001). Several structural indices were correlated with clinical variables. In the RA group, HAMA scores correlated positively with CT in the left superior frontal gyrus and both inferior and superior parts of the right middle frontal gyrus ( P = 0.0001). VAS scores correlated positively with CT in the left fusiform gyrus and entorhinal cortex ( P = 0.0001). Swollen joint counts correlated positively with CT in the inferior left middle frontal gyrus ( P = 0.0001) and right inferior parietal lobule ( P = 0.0004), positively with FD in the left precuneus ( P < 0.0001), and negatively with FD in the right inferior parietal gyrus ( P = 0.0001). DAS28 (CRP) correlated positively with GI and negatively with SD in the opercular part of the left inferior frontal gyrus and the right superior temporal gyrus ( P = 0.0001). HAMD scores correlated negatively with GI and SD in the left inferior parietal gyrus, right supramarginal gyrus, and right precentral gyrus (GI: P = 0.0002, P < 0.0001, P = 0.0001; SD: P = 0.0002, P < 0.0001, P = 0.0003). CRP correlated positively with FD in the right postcentral gyrus and right superior parietal gyrus ( P < 0.0001). MoCA scores correlated negatively with FD in the left superior frontal gyrus ( P = 0.0001). Tender joint counts correlated negatively with SD in the left inferior parietal gyrus ( P < 0.0001) and with FD in the opercular part of the left inferior frontal gyrus ( P < 0.0001). Through multi-parameter joint analysis, this study systematically depicted the multi-dimensional changes in brain structure of patients with RA for the first time and initially established a framework for their association with disease activity, emotional and cognitive impairment, and inflammatory levels.

items.title: Real-world retention rate of secukinumab in patients with axial spondyloarthritis: Multi-centric retrospective data from China.
items.abstract: Secukinumab (SEC), an interleukin 17A inhibitors (IL-17Ai) has been shown to be effective in managing axial spondyloarthritis (axSpA). However, data on its long-term retention in Chinese populations remain limited. This study aims to evaluate the retention rate of SEC in axSpA and its predisposing factors in Chinese patients. We conducted a retrospective cohort study across three centers, including axSpA patients treated with SEC. Prescription records were retrieved from the hospital information system (HIS) and electronic medical records were reviewed to confirm diagnoses and treatment exposures. Retention rates at 12, 24, and 36 months were estimated using Kaplan-Meier analysis. Cox proportional hazards regression assessed the impact of prior biologic therapy and dosage on discontinuation risk. Discontinuation events were also evaluated. A total of 459 patients were identified and included, with the longest treatment follow-up period reaching 42 months. The overall drug retention rates for SEC were 76.1%, 68.7%, and 62.8% at 12, 24, and 36 months, respectively. Biologics-naïve patients exhibited a higher 12-month retention rate (80.7%) compared to biologic-experienced patients (72.5%). Among biologic-experienced patients, the 12-month retention rates progressively decreased with an increasing number of prior biologics: 74.6% for one prior biologic, 72.0% for two, and 55.3% for three. No statistically significant difference in retention rate was observed between the 300 mg and 150 mg groups ( P = 0.334). A total of 82 patients (17.86%) discontinued SEC. The primary reason for discontinuation was switching to alternative therapies ( n = 70, 85.4% of discontinuations). SEC demonstrates robust retention rates in this Chinese axSpA cohort, particularly among biologics-naïve patients.

items.titleZh: 司库奇尤单抗在中轴型脊柱关节炎患者中的真实世界保留率：来自中国的多中心回顾性数据
items.abstractZh: 司库奇尤单抗（SEC），一种白细胞介素17A抑制剂（IL-17Ai），已被证明对治疗中轴型脊柱关节炎（axSpA）有效。然而，关于其在中国人群中长期保留的数据仍然有限。本研究旨在评估SEC在axSpA患者中的保留率及其在中国患者中的易感因素。我们进行了一项多中心回顾性队列研究，纳入接受SEC治疗的axSpA患者。从医院信息系统（HIS）中检索处方记录，并审查电子病历以确认诊断和治疗暴露。使用Kaplan-Meier分析估计12、24和36个月的保留率。Cox比例风险回归评估既往生物制剂治疗和剂量对停药风险的影响。同时评估停药事件。共识别并纳入459名患者，最长治疗随访期达42个月。SEC的总体药物保留率在12、24和36个月分别为76.1%、68.7%和62.8%。生物制剂初治患者的12个月保留率（80.7%）高于生物制剂经治患者（72.5%）。在生物制剂经治患者中，12个月保留率随着既往生物制剂数量的增加而逐渐下降：既往使用一种生物制剂为74.6%，两种为72.0%，三种为55.3%。300 mg组和150 mg组之间的保留率差异无统计学意义（P = 0.334）。共有82名患者（17.86%）停用SEC。停药的主要原因是换用其他疗法（n = 70，占停药原因的85.4%）。SEC在这一中国axSpA队列中显示出稳健的保留率，尤其是在生物制剂初治患者中。

items.title: Diagnostic value of lung ultrasound in interstitial lung disease associated with rheumatoid arthritis: Correlation with HRCT and differentiation of ILD subtypes.
items.abstract: Rheumatoid arthritis (RA) is a systemic autoimmune disease in which interstitial lung disease (ILD) is a major extra-articular complication. Detection of RA-ILD is challenging because chest X-ray and pulmonary function tests have limited sensitivity, while high-resolution computed tomography (HRCT), although the reference standard, is constrained by cost and radiation exposure. Lung ultrasound (LUS) has therefore emerged as a practical bedside imaging tool. This study aimed to assess the diagnostic performance of LUS for RA-ILD using HRCT as the reference standard, examine its correlation with radiological and functional parameters, and evaluate its ability to distinguish ILD subtypes and severity stages. This prospective observational study included 86 RA patients with respiratory symptoms or auscultatory findings suggestive of ILD. All participants underwent clinical evaluation, CXR, PFTs, TUS, and HRCT. Sonographic parameters included B-line count, spacing, pleural line morphology, and lung sliding. HRCT findings were classified by ILD patterns, and the Warrick score was used to assess ILD severity. Receiver operating characteristic (ROC) analysis was performed to determine optimal B-line cutoffs. Eighty-six RA patients were enrolled, with ILD confirmed by HRCT in 62 (72.1%). LUS demonstrated the highest diagnostic sensitivity (90.0%) among all modalities, outperforming CXR, PFTs, and auscultation. Diagnostic performance improved when stratified by HRCT pattern and disease severity, with higher AUCs for UIP (0.823), NSIP (0.816), and severe ILD (0.986). LUS B-line count showed a strong positive correlation with HRCT Warrick score (r = 0.933, p < 0.0001) and moderate negative correlations with forced vital capacity (FVC) and oxygen saturation. ROC analysis identified ≥ 10.5 B-lines as the optimal threshold for ILD detection (AUC = 0.766), achieving high sensitivity and moderate specificity. Lung ultrasound is an effective, accessible, and non-invasive screening modality for the detection of ILD in RA patients. Its integration into routine clinical practice can facilitate earlier diagnosis, assist in non-invasive differentiation of ILD subtypes, guide timely intervention, and improve patient outcomes. The identification of pattern- and severity-specific B-line cutoffs represents a novel contribution, extends existing evidence beyond a single universal threshold and highlights the added value of tailored ultrasound interpretation.

items.titleZh: 肺超声在类风湿关节炎相关间质性肺疾病中的诊断价值：与HRCT的相关性及ILD亚型的鉴别
items.abstractZh: 类风湿关节炎（RA）是一种系统性自身免疫性疾病，其中间质性肺疾病（ILD）是主要的关节外并发症。RA-ILD的检测具有挑战性，因为胸部X线和肺功能检查的敏感性有限，而高分辨率计算机断层扫描（HRCT）虽然是参考标准，但受成本和辐射暴露的限制。因此，肺超声（LUS）已成为一种实用的床旁成像工具。本研究旨在以HRCT为参考标准评估LUS对RA-ILD的诊断性能，检查其与放射学和功能参数的相关性，并评估其区分ILD亚型和严重程度分期的能力。这项前瞻性观察性研究纳入了86名有呼吸道症状或听诊提示ILD的RA患者。所有参与者均接受了临床评估、CXR、PFTs、TUS和HRCT。超声参数包括B线计数、间距、胸膜线形态和肺滑动。HRCT结果按ILD模式分类，并使用Warrick评分评估ILD严重程度。进行受试者工作特征（ROC）分析以确定最佳B线截断值。共纳入86名RA患者，其中62名（72.1%）经HRCT确诊为ILD。LUS在所有检查方式中显示出最高的诊断敏感性（90.0%），优于CXR、PFTs和听诊。按HRCT模式和疾病严重程度分层后，诊断性能得到改善，UIP（0.823）、NSIP（0.816）和重度ILD（0.986）的AUC更高。LUS B线计数与HRCT Warrick评分呈强正相关（r = 0.933，p < 0.0001），与用力肺活量（FVC）和血氧饱和度呈中度负相关。ROC分析确定≥10.5条B线为ILD检测的最佳阈值（AUC = 0.766），具有高敏感性和中等特异性。肺超声是一种有效、可及且无创的筛查方式，用于检测RA患者的ILD。将其整合到常规临床实践中可以促进早期诊断，协助无创鉴别ILD亚型，指导及时干预，并改善患者预后。识别模式特异性和严重程度特异性的B线截断值是一项新的贡献，扩展了单一通用阈值之外的现有证据，并突出了定制化超声解读的附加价值。

items.title: Sex Differences in Treatment Response to Targeted Therapy in Rheumatoid Arthritis: A Post Hoc Analysis of a Prospective Observational Study.
items.abstract: Sex differences in treatment outcomes for rheumatoid arthritis (RA) have been inconsistently reported. This study aimed to investigate whether male and female patients with RA have different treatment responses to their first-line targeted therapies. This post hoc analysis used data from a prospective multicenter observational study of patients with RA initiating biologic disease-modifying anti-rheumatic drugs or Janus kinase inhibitors for the first time. The primary outcome was remission measured by the 28-joint Disease Activity Score with erythrocyte sedimentation rate (DAS28-ESR) at week 24. Remission rates were compared between male and female patients. Conditional logistic regression models, matched on RA disease duration and baseline disease activity, were used to analyze the independent effect of sex on remission. Overall, 78 male and 428 female patients were included. In the per-protocol analysis, the DAS28-ESR remission rates at week 24 were higher in male patients (44.3%) than in female patients (28.9%) ( P = 0.025). Conditional logistic regression showed that male sex was independently associated with achieving remission (adjusted odds ratio [aOR], 2.76; 95% confidence interval [CI], 1.25-6.08). In the subgroup of patients with early RA (disease duration ≤ 2 years), male patients had significantly higher odds of achieving remission than female patients (aOR, 11.59; 95% CI, 2.56-52.54). A similar trend was observed in the subgroup of patients who initiated Janus kinase inhibitors (aOR, 2.37; 95% CI, 1.02-5.52). Male patients with RA achieve higher remission rates than female patients when initiating first-line targeted therapies, particularly in early disease. These findings suggest the need for sex-specific strategies in RA management.

items.titleZh: 类风湿关节炎靶向治疗应答的性别差异：一项前瞻性观察性研究的后续分析
items.abstractZh: 类风湿关节炎（RA）治疗结局的性别差异报道不一致。本研究旨在探讨男性和女性RA患者对一线靶向治疗的治疗应答是否存在差异。本后续分析使用了来自一项前瞻性多中心观察性研究的数据，该研究纳入首次启用生物制剂改善病情抗风湿药或Janus激酶抑制剂的RA患者。主要结局是第24周时通过28关节疾病活动度评分-红细胞沉降率（DAS28-ESR）测量的缓解率。比较男性和女性患者的缓解率。采用条件逻辑回归模型（按RA病程和基线疾病活动度匹配）分析性别对缓解的独立影响。共纳入78名男性和428名女性患者。在符合方案分析中，第24周时男性患者的DAS28-ESR缓解率（44.3%）高于女性患者（28.9%）（P = 0.025）。条件逻辑回归显示，男性与实现缓解独立相关（校正后比值比[aOR]为2.76；95%置信区间[CI]为1.25-6.08）。在早期RA（病程≤2年）亚组中，男性患者实现缓解的几率显著高于女性患者（aOR为11.59；95% CI为2.56-52.54）。在启用Janus激酶抑制剂的亚组中也观察到类似趋势（aOR为2.37；95% CI为1.02-5.52）。男性RA患者在启用一线靶向治疗时，尤其是疾病早期，其缓解率高于女性患者。这些发现提示RA管理中需要性别特异性策略。

items.title: Effectiveness and probability of full disease control with canakinumab in familial Mediterranean fever: real-world data from the AIDA Network.
items.abstract: To assess the effectiveness of canakinumab (CAN) in controlling clinical and laboratory inflammation by achieving complete control of cardinal disease manifestations and full normalization of laboratory inflammatory markers. Data were obtained from the international AutoInflammatory Disease Alliance (AIDA) network registry, dedicated to monogenic autoinflammatory diseases. The assessment included both retrospective and prospective real-world data. In total, 158 FMF patients treated with CAN were enrolled. Complete clinical-laboratory response was observed in 45.6% of patients at 3 months, 58.6% at 12 months, and 55.2% at the last follow-up, after a mean treatment duration of 45 months. Partial response occurred in 16.5%, 12.5%, and 16.8% at the same timepoints, respectively. Complete absence of clinical manifestations was observed in > 80% of patients at each timepoint. Inflammatory markers normalized significantly by the 3-month assessment. The probability of achieving and maintaining complete response and full laboratory control appeared higher in patients reaching these outcomes by 3 months, although it remained substantial in other patients as well. Complete response was associated with a relapsing-remitting disease course and fewer annual attacks. Nearly all patients maintained stable organ damage scores, and therapy discontinuation due to inefficacy was rare (≤6%). CAN is effective in achieving rapid and sustained clinical and laboratory control in FMF, including stringent endpoints of complete response. Early effectiveness may favour better long-term outcomes, but delayed achievement of complete response and full laboratory control is not uncommon. This study confirms CAN as an effective, and durable therapeutic option in FMF.

items.titleZh: 卡那奴单抗在家族性地中海热中实现完全疾病控制的有效性和概率：来自AIDA网络的真实世界数据
items.abstractZh: 评估卡那奴单抗（CAN）在控制临床和实验室炎症方面的有效性，通过实现主要疾病表现的完全控制和实验室炎症标志物的完全正常化。数据来自国际自身炎症性疾病联盟（AIDA）网络注册库，该注册库专注于单基因自身炎症性疾病。评估包括回顾性和前瞻性真实世界数据。总共纳入了158名接受CAN治疗的FMF患者。在平均治疗45个月后，3个月时观察到45.6%的患者达到完全临床-实验室反应，12个月时为58.6%，末次随访时为55.2%。在同一时间点，部分反应分别发生在16.5%、12.5%和16.8%的患者中。在每个时间点，超过80%的患者观察到临床表现完全消失。炎症标志物在3个月评估时显著正常化。在3个月内达到这些结局的患者中，实现和维持完全反应及完全实验室控制的概率似乎更高，尽管在其他患者中这一概率也相当可观。完全反应与复发-缓解病程和较少的年发作次数相关。几乎所有患者维持稳定的器官损伤评分，因无效而停药的情况罕见（≤6%）。CAN在FMF中能有效实现快速且持续的临床和实验室控制，包括严格的完全反应终点。早期有效性可能有利于更好的长期结局，但延迟达到完全反应和完全实验室控制的情况并不少见。本研究证实CAN是FMF中一种有效且持久的治疗选择。

items.title: Triglyceride-Glucose Index for predicting gout flare risk post-urate-lowering therapy: a prospective cohort study.
items.abstract: Although urate-lowering therapy (ULT) is a cornerstone of gout management, some patients still experience recurrent gout flares. This study aimed to determine the predictive value of the triglyceride-glucose (TyG) index for the risk of gout flares in patients with gout after ULT. A prospective cohort study enrolled 384 gout patients, stratified by baseline TyG index into high (≥9.0), moderate (8.5≤TyG index<9.0), and low (<8.5) groups. All received standardised ULT (febuxostat + low-dose colchicine) with 12-week follow-up to record target serum urate achievement and gout flare frequency. A total of 362 patients completed the follow-up. The rate of achieving the target SU level (<6 mg/dL) at week 4 was significantly lower in the high TyG index group than in the low TyG index group (17.6% vs. 34.2%, p<0.01). No significant differences were observed among the three groups at week 8 or week 12 of achieving the target SU level. However, the high TyG index group had a significantly higher frequency of gout flares compared with the moderate and low TyG index groups (0.975 vs. 0.632 and 0.419, p<0.001). The TyG index can serve as an effective predictor of gout flare risk after ULT, with those having a high TyG index exhibiting a higher risk, which might be related to the insulin resistance status. Incorporating the TyG index into routine clinical assessments may provide a novel metabolic strategy for personalised prevention and treatment of gout.

items.titleZh: 甘油三酯-葡萄糖指数预测降尿酸治疗后痛风发作风险：一项前瞻性队列研究
items.abstractZh: 尽管降尿酸治疗（ULT）是痛风管理的基石，但部分患者仍会经历反复的痛风发作。本研究旨在确定甘油三酯-葡萄糖（TyG）指数对痛风患者ULT后痛风发作风险的预测价值。一项前瞻性队列研究纳入了384名痛风患者，根据基线TyG指数分为高（≥9.0）、中（8.5≤TyG指数<9.0）和低（<8.5）三组。所有患者接受标准化ULT（非布司他+低剂量秋水仙碱），随访12周，记录目标血尿酸达标情况和痛风发作频率。共362名患者完成随访。第4周时，高TyG指数组达到目标SU水平（<6 mg/dL）的比例显著低于低TyG指数组（17.6% vs. 34.2%，p<0.01）。在第8周或第12周，三组间达到目标SU水平的比例无显著差异。然而，高TyG指数组的痛风发作频率显著高于中、低TyG指数组（0.975 vs. 0.632和0.419，p<0.001）。TyG指数可作为ULT后痛风发作风险的有效预测指标，高TyG指数者风险更高，这可能与胰岛素抵抗状态有关。将TyG指数纳入常规临床评估可能为痛风的个体化预防和治疗提供一种新的代谢策略。

items.title: Do DMARDs increase the risk of cancer recurrence in patients with spondyloarthritis, psoriatic arthritis and rheumatoid arthritis?
items.abstract: To assess whether the use of immunosuppressants after cancer diagnosis in patients with spondyloarthritis (SpA) and rheumatoid arthritis (RA) is associated with increased risk of cancer recurrence or mortality. We consecutively enrolled patients with spondyloarthritis (SpA), psoriatic arthritis (PsA), or rheumatoid arthritis (RA) and concomitant invasive cancer (2015-2024). The association between treatment exposure and recurrence was estimated using time-dependent Cox proportional hazards models to prevent immortal time bias. Sensitivity analyses adjusted for age, comorbidities, and treatment history. The impact of treatment timing was assessed using varying thresholds (36, 48, 60, 72 months). A total of 128 patients with inflammatory arthritis and invasive cancer were included (43 SpA, 35 PsA, 50 RA), with a median follow-up of 58.1 months. Twenty-four patients (18.7%) experienced cancer recurrence or progression. In time-dependent Cox proportional hazards models, post-cancer exposure to bDMARDs or JAK inhibitors was initially associated with a higher risk of recurrence (HR 2.79, 95% CI 1.33-5.84); however, this association was attenuated and no longer statistically significant after adjustment for age at cancer diagnosis and comorbidity burden. No significant association was observed between the timing of treatment initiation after cancer diagnosis and recurrence risk when different cut-offs (36, 48, 60, and 72 months) were tested. The risk of cancer recurrence associated with post-cancer immunosuppression appears largely driven by patients' age and comorbidities rather than the therapy itself. We found no evidence that initiating treatment within the standard 5-year safety window increases recurrence risk, supporting tailored, multidisciplinary management over rigid time thresholds.

items.titleZh: DMARDs是否会增加脊柱关节炎、银屑病关节炎和类风湿关节炎患者的癌症复发风险？
items.abstractZh: 评估脊柱关节炎（SpA）和类风湿关节炎（RA）患者在癌症诊断后使用免疫抑制剂是否与癌症复发或死亡风险增加相关。我们连续纳入2015-2024年间患有脊柱关节炎（SpA）、银屑病关节炎（PsA）或类风湿关节炎（RA）并伴有侵袭性癌症的患者。使用时间依赖性Cox比例风险模型估计治疗暴露与复发之间的关联，以避免不朽时间偏倚。敏感性分析调整了年龄、合并症和治疗史。使用不同阈值（36、48、60、72个月）评估治疗时机的影响。共纳入128例炎症性关节炎合并侵袭性癌症患者（SpA 43例，PsA 35例，RA 50例），中位随访58.1个月。24例患者（18.7%）出现癌症复发或进展。在时间依赖性Cox比例风险模型中，癌症诊断后暴露于bDMARDs或JAK抑制剂最初与较高的复发风险相关（HR 2.79，95% CI 1.33-5.84）；然而，在调整癌症诊断年龄和合并症负担后，该关联减弱且不再具有统计学显著性。当测试不同截断值（36、48、60和72个月）时，未观察到癌症诊断后治疗开始时机与复发风险之间存在显著关联。癌症诊断后免疫抑制相关的复发风险似乎主要由患者年龄和合并症驱动，而非治疗本身。我们没有发现证据表明在标准5年安全窗口内开始治疗会增加复发风险，这支持个体化的多学科管理而非严格的时间阈值。

items.title: Phosphodiesterase-5 inhibitors, but not calcium channel blockers, improve peripheral vascular function in systemic sclerosis.
items.abstract: Systemic sclerosis (SSc) is a rare autoimmune disease associated with vasculopathy. Raynaud's phenomenon is a common symptom of SSc, and treatment guidelines support calcium channel blocker (CCB) and phosphodiesterase inhibitor-5 (PDE5i) as first- and second-line therapy, respectively. However, the impact of these drug classes on peripheral vascular function or haemodynamic outcomes in SSc is unknown. Flow-mediated dilation (FMD) was measured in patients with SSc (n=119) that were allocated into groups based on cardiovascular-acting medications usage within the previous 24 hours. Clinical cardiovascular outcomes were unaffected by acute cardiovascular-acting medications, with the exception of PDE5i that resulted in lower diastolic blood pressure (CV Meds+PDE5i: 66±11 vs. No CV Meds: 74±8; CV Meds: 72±8; CV Meds+CCB: 73±7 mmHg, p<0.05). Patients on CCB had similar FMD to patients with and without cardiovascularacting medication usage (No CV Meds: 7.6±4.0; CV Meds: 6.2±3.4: CV Meds+CCB: 5.8±3.1%, p>0.05), while FMD in patients on PDE5i (CV Meds+PDE5i: 8.9±4.4%) was greater than patients with cardiovascular-acting medication usage regardless of the presence or absence of CCB usage (p<0.05). A subset of patients (n=17) completed multiple testing visits with and without CCB usage in the previous 24 hours, CCB usage did not affect FMD (No CCB: 6.7±3.4 vs. CCB: 7.7±6.6, p>0.05). Acute CCB usage does not affect peripheral vascular function or haemodynamic outcomes in patients with SSc, whereas acute PDE5i usage results in lower diastolic blood pressure and greater FMD. These findings suggest that PDE5i improves vascular function in SSc, while CCB usage does not.

items.titleZh: 磷酸二酯酶-5抑制剂（而非钙通道阻滞剂）改善系统性硬化症的外周血管功能
items.abstractZh: 系统性硬化症（SSc）是一种与血管病变相关的罕见自身免疫性疾病。雷诺现象是SSc的常见症状，治疗指南支持钙通道阻滞剂（CCB）和磷酸二酯酶-5抑制剂（PDE5i）分别作为一线和二线治疗。然而，这些药物类别对SSc患者外周血管功能或血流动力学结局的影响尚不清楚。对119例SSc患者进行了血流介导的扩张（FMD）测量，根据过去24小时内使用心血管活性药物的情况进行分组。除PDE5i导致舒张压降低外（CV Meds+PDE5i: 66±11 vs. No CV Meds: 74±8; CV Meds: 72±8; CV Meds+CCB: 73±7 mmHg, p<0.05），急性心血管活性药物对临床心血管结局无影响。使用CCB的患者与未使用心血管活性药物的患者FMD相似（No CV Meds: 7.6±4.0; CV Meds: 6.2±3.4: CV Meds+CCB: 5.8±3.1%, p>0.05），而使用PDE5i的患者（CV Meds+PDE5i: 8.9±4.4%）的FMD高于使用心血管活性药物（无论是否使用CCB）的患者（p<0.05）。17例患者完成了多次测试访视（过去24小时内使用或不使用CCB），CCB使用不影响FMD（No CCB: 6.7±3.4 vs. CCB: 7.7±6.6, p>0.05）。急性CCB使用不影响SSc患者的外周血管功能或血流动力学结局，而急性PDE5i使用导致舒张压降低和FMD升高。这些发现表明PDE5i改善SSc的血管功能，而CCB使用则无此作用。

items.title: Identification of intestinal biomarkers for evaluating disease activity in rheumatoid arthritis.
items.abstract: To clarify the crucial prediction role of intestinal barrier markers - lipopolysaccharide binding protein (LBP), soluble cluster of differentiation 14 (sCD14), and intestinal fatty acid binding protein (I-FABP) - through combined diagnostics in rheumatoid arthritis (RA) patients. A retrospective multi-centre study was conducted involving 139 RA patients from three hospitals, alongside 52 healthy controls (HCs). Serum levels of LBP, sCD14, and I-FABP were quantified by enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay (ELISA). Clinical records were systematically collected, and receiver operating characteristic (ROC) analysis was performed to assess the predictive performance of the biomarkers. Compared to HCs, serum levels of sCD14, LBP and I-FABP were significantly higher in RA patients (p<0.05). Among those, sCD14 levels demonstrated a significant positive correlation with disease activity score for 28 joints based on C-reactive protein (DAS28-CRP) (p=0.002), DAS28 based on erythrocyte sedimentation rate (DAS28-ESR) (p=0.048) and inflammatory index. I-FABP also exhibited a positive association with DAS28-ESR (p=0.027). The triad of biomarkers demonstrated a superior diagnostic capability for distinguishing RA from HCs (area under the curve [AUC]=0.936; p<0.001) and contributed to the reliability of disease activity prediction, yielding an AUC of 0.804. Notably, sCD14 levels emerged as an independent predictor of synovitis (odds ratio: 1.834, 95% confidence interval: [1.160-2.901], p=0.009). Intestinal barrier-related biomarkers are associated with disease activity in RA. The combined assessment of LBP, sCD14, and I-FABP demonstrates good performance in differentiating RA from HCs and in evaluating disease activity. Furthermore, sCD14 may serve as a potential indicator of active synovitis, highlighting the clinical value of these biomarkers as complementary tools for disease assessment.

items.titleZh: 鉴定用于评估类风湿关节炎疾病活动度的肠道生物标志物
items.abstractZh: 为了阐明肠道屏障标志物——脂多糖结合蛋白（LBP）、可溶性分化簇14（sCD14）和肠脂肪酸结合蛋白（I-FABP）——通过联合诊断在类风湿关节炎（RA）患者中的关键预测作用。进行了一项回顾性多中心研究，涉及来自三家医院的139名RA患者以及52名健康对照（HCs）。通过酶联免疫吸附试验（ELISA）定量检测血清LBP、sCD14和I-FABP水平。系统收集临床记录，并进行受试者工作特征（ROC）分析以评估生物标志物的预测性能。与HCs相比，RA患者血清sCD14、LBP和I-FABP水平显著升高（p<0.05）。其中，sCD14水平与基于C反应蛋白的28关节疾病活动度评分（DAS28-CRP）（p=0.002）、基于红细胞沉降率的DAS28（DAS28-ESR）（p=0.048）以及炎症指数呈显著正相关。I-FABP也与DAS28-ESR呈正相关（p=0.027）。这三种生物标志物的联合在区分RA与HCs方面表现出优越的诊断能力（曲线下面积[AUC]=0.936；p<0.001），并有助于疾病活动度预测的可靠性，AUC为0.804。值得注意的是，sCD14水平成为滑膜炎的独立预测因子（比值比：1.834，95%置信区间：[1.160-2.901]，p=0.009）。肠道屏障相关生物标志物与RA疾病活动度相关。LBP、sCD14和I-FABP的联合评估在区分RA与HCs以及评估疾病活动度方面表现出良好性能。此外，sCD14可能作为活动性滑膜炎的潜在指标，凸显了这些生物标志物作为疾病评估补充工具的临床价值。

items.title: Effects of Intravenous Lidocaine on Rheumatoid Arthritis in Preclinical Rat Model and Clinical Trial.
items.abstract: Rheumatoid arthritis (RA) is characterized by chronic synovial inflammation and pain. Lidocaine has anti-inflammation and pain-relieving properties. This study intends to evaluate the effects of lidocaine on RA in a preclinical rat model and a clinical trial. Rats with adjuvant-induced arthritis (AIA) received intravenous lidocaine or no treatment. Pain behavior parameters and arthritis index (AI) were assessed. Synovial tissue lesions, the number of M1 macrophages and gene expression of inflammatory molecules: IKKα, NF-κB p65, IL-1β and TNF-α were profiled by immunohistochemical staining or quantitative PCR. In clinical trial, RA patients (n=40) were assigned into two groups: control group received conventional treatments, lidocaine group: received conventional treatment and intravenous lidocaine for 5 days. Visual analogue scale score (VAS), disease activity score 28 (DAS28) and temperature in painful joint area were recorded. Lidocaine-treated rats had significantly lower pain parameters, synovial pathology and AI scores, M1 macrophages and gene expressions of inflammatory molecules in synovial tissues on day 28 post modeling compared to AIA rats without the treatment. In a clinical trial, patients who received intravenous lidocaine had similar VAS, DAS28 and SDAI scores in comparison with patients without the treatment. However, lidocaine-treated patients had significantly lower temperatures in the painful joint areas and dosages of glucocorticoids and nonsteroidal anti-inflammatory drugs during the treatment period, compared to patients without intravenous lidocaine. Intravenous lidocaine attenuated joint pain and synovial inflammation in preclinical AIA rat model and provided adjunctive beneficial effects for the treatment of RA patients.

items.titleZh: 静脉注射利多卡因对类风湿关节炎的影响：临床前大鼠模型和临床试验
items.abstractZh: 类风湿关节炎（RA）以慢性滑膜炎症和疼痛为特征。利多卡因具有抗炎和镇痛作用。本研究旨在评估利多卡因在临床前大鼠模型和临床试验中对RA的影响。佐剂诱导性关节炎（AIA）大鼠接受静脉注射利多卡因或不治疗。评估疼痛行为参数和关节炎指数（AI）。通过免疫组织化学染色或定量PCR分析滑膜组织病变、M1巨噬细胞数量以及炎症分子IKKα、NF-κB p65、IL-1β和TNF-α的基因表达。在临床试验中，RA患者（n=40）被分为两组：对照组接受常规治疗，利多卡因组接受常规治疗和静脉注射利多卡因5天。记录视觉模拟评分（VAS）、疾病活动评分28（DAS28）和疼痛关节区域温度。与未治疗的AIA大鼠相比，利多卡因治疗的大鼠在建模后第28天的疼痛参数、滑膜病理和AI评分、M1巨噬细胞以及滑膜组织中炎症分子的基因表达显著降低。在临床试验中，与未接受治疗的患者相比，接受静脉注射利多卡因的患者在VAS、DAS28和SDAI评分方面相似。然而，与未接受静脉注射利多卡因的患者相比，利多卡因治疗的患者在治疗期间疼痛关节区域的温度以及糖皮质激素和非甾体抗炎药的剂量显著降低。静脉注射利多卡因在临床前AIA大鼠模型中减轻了关节疼痛和滑膜炎症，并为RA患者的治疗提供了辅助有益效果。

items.title: Safety and Microvascular Effect of Four-Year Aminaphtone Administration in Systemic Sclerosis Patients.
items.abstract: Endothelial and microvascular damage is a hallmark of systemic sclerosis (SSc), an autoimmune connective tissue disease characterized by progressive skin and organ fibrosis. Aminaphtone (3-Methyl-1,4-dioxo-1,4-dihydro-naphthalen-2-yl-amino-benzoate) is a synthetic molecule used to treat microvascular disorders. Nailfold videocapillaroscopy (NVC) is the most reliable non-invasive method for assessing microvascular status and disease progression in SSc patients. To evaluate long-term safety and potential beneficial effects of aminaphtone on microcirculation in SSc. Seventy-six SSc patients (68 females, 8 males; mean age 69 ± 15 years) fulfilling the 2013 ACR/EULAR criteria and presenting Raynaud's phenomenon received aminaphtone (75 mg twice daily) in addition to stable standard therapy (ST). Forty age- and sex-matched SSc patients treated with ST alone served as controls. Side effects were monitored every six months. NVC was performed at baseline and after 1 and 4 years, using the Cutolo classification ("Early", "Active", "Late" patterns) to evaluate microvascular damage progression. Aminaphtone showed a high long-term retention rate (89.5%) over four years. Eight of 76 patients (10.5%) discontinued treatment due to mild transient intolerance or poor compliance; no serious adverse events were reported. NVC patterns remained stable in 91% of treated patients. Compared with controls, aminaphtone-treated patients showed a slower transition from "Active" to "Late" NVC pattern (120 ± 64 vs 50 ± 26 months, p = 0.05). Linear mixed-effects modelling showed a significantly slower capillary density decline in the aminaphtone group over 48 months (p < 0.05) in both "Early" and "Active" scleroderma pattern subgroups. On multivariate linear regression, this effect was independent of age, disease phenotype, and concomitant therapies. Aminaphtone appears safe and well tolerated during long-term treatment in SSc patients with secondary Raynaud's phenomenon. The stability of NVC scleroderma patterns and the independent protective effect on capillary loss suggest a potential adjunctive role of aminaphtone in limiting microvascular damage progression when added to ST in SSc.

items.titleZh: 系统性硬化症患者四年氨萘酮给药的安全性及微血管效应
items.abstractZh: 内皮和微血管损伤是系统性硬化症（SSc）的标志，这是一种以进行性皮肤和器官纤维化为特征的自身免疫性结缔组织病。氨萘酮（3-甲基-1,4-二氧代-1,4-二氢萘-2-基-氨基苯甲酸酯）是一种用于治疗微血管疾病的合成分子。甲襞视频毛细血管镜（NVC）是评估SSc患者微血管状态和疾病进展最可靠的非侵入性方法。评估氨萘酮对SSc微循环的长期安全性和潜在有益效应。76例符合2013年ACR/EULAR标准并出现雷诺现象的SSc患者（女性68例，男性8例；平均年龄69±15岁）在稳定标准治疗（ST）基础上接受氨萘酮（75 mg每日两次）。40例年龄和性别匹配的仅接受ST治疗的SSc患者作为对照。每六个月监测一次副作用。在基线、1年和4年时进行NVC检查，使用Cutolo分类（“早期”、“活动期”、“晚期”模式）评估微血管损伤进展。氨萘酮在四年内显示出较高的长期保留率（89.5%）。76例患者中有8例（10.5%）因轻度短暂不耐受或依从性差而停药；未报告严重不良事件。91%的治疗患者NVC模式保持稳定。与对照组相比，氨萘酮治疗患者从“活动期”向“晚期”NVC模式转变较慢（120±64 vs 50±26个月，p=0.05）。线性混合效应模型显示，在48个月内，氨萘酮组在“早期”和“活动期”硬皮病模式亚组中毛细血管密度下降显著更慢（p<0.05）。在多变量线性回归中，该效应独立于年龄、疾病表型和伴随治疗。氨萘酮在伴有继发性雷诺现象的SSc患者长期治疗中安全且耐受性良好。NVC硬皮病模式的稳定性以及对毛细血管丢失的独立保护作用提示，在ST基础上加用氨萘酮可能具有限制微血管损伤进展的辅助作用。

items.title: Serum Proteomics Identified the Association of Haptoglobin and Orosomucoid 1 with Disease Activity in Takayasu Arteritis.
items.abstract: Takayasu arteritis (TAK) is a chronic granulomatous vasculitis, and accurate early diagnosis and assessment of disease activity remain significant clinical challenge. Traditional biomarkers such as CRP and ESR have insufficient sensitivity and specificity. High-throughput proteomics provides a robust method for discovering new biomarkers for TAK. A comparative serum proteomic analysis of 8 TAK patients and 9 healthy controls (HCs) was conducted using mass spectrometry. Bioinformatic analyses were performed on differentially expressed proteins (DEPs). Candidate biomarkers were prioritized through machine learning and correlation analyses. An independent validation cohort with 51 TAK patients and 31 HCs was used to confirm the biomarkers using ELISA. The correlations were assessed between the new biomarkers and the clinical parameters as well as disease activity scores. We identified 88 DEPs between TAK patients and HCs. Pathway analysis revealed enrichment in phagosome, platelet activation, and inflammatory response. Among these, Haptoglobin (HP) and Orosomucoid 1 (ORM1) were selected as top candidate biomarkers based on their high feature importance scores and strong correlation with inflammatory markers. ELISA validation confirmed that serum levels of HP and ORM1 were significantly elevated in TAK patients compared with HCs, and further increased in active TAK compared with stable TAK patients. Both biomarkers showed significant positive correlations with clinical inflammatory indicators (ESR, FIB, WBC) and immune cell counts, as well as disease activity scores. Our integrated proteomic analysis identified HP and ORM1 as 2 novel serum biomarkers significantly associated with disease activity, inflammatory and immune processes in TAK.

items.titleZh: 血清蛋白质组学鉴定触珠蛋白和α1-酸性糖蛋白1与Takayasu动脉炎疾病活动性的关联
items.abstractZh: Takayasu动脉炎（TAK）是一种慢性肉芽肿性血管炎，准确的早期诊断和疾病活动性评估仍是临床重大挑战。传统生物标志物如CRP和ESR的敏感性和特异性不足。高通量蛋白质组学为发现TAK新生物标志物提供了可靠方法。采用质谱法对8例TAK患者和9例健康对照（HCs）进行血清蛋白质组学比较分析。对差异表达蛋白（DEPs）进行生物信息学分析。通过机器学习和相关性分析优先筛选候选生物标志物。使用51例TAK患者和31例HCs的独立验证队列，通过ELISA确认生物标志物。评估新生物标志物与临床参数及疾病活动性评分的相关性。我们在TAK患者和HCs之间鉴定出88个DEPs。通路分析显示吞噬体、血小板活化和炎症反应富集。其中，触珠蛋白（HP）和α1-酸性糖蛋白1（ORM1）因其高特征重要性评分及与炎症标志物的强相关性被选为最佳候选生物标志物。ELISA验证证实，与HCs相比，TAK患者血清HP和ORM1水平显著升高，且活动期TAK患者较稳定期TAK患者进一步升高。两种生物标志物均与临床炎症指标（ESR、FIB、WBC）、免疫细胞计数及疾病活动性评分呈显著正相关。我们的整合蛋白质组学分析确定HP和ORM1为2种与TAK疾病活动性、炎症及免疫过程显著相关的新型血清生物标志物。

items.title: Cuproptosis: A Potential Target for the Treatment of Systemic Lupus Erythematosus.
items.abstract: Systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) is a heterogeneous autoimmune disease characterized by multi-organ involvement and broad immunological abnormalities, including persistent positive anti-nuclear antibodies. Different from many other autoimmune disorders, SLE is associated with significant disruption of copper homeostasis. Accumulating clinical evidence demonstrates elevated serum copper concentrations in SLE patients, which are closely associated with disease activity and inflammatory status. Despite advances in disease management, effective therapeutic options for SLE remain limited. Most SLE patients still require nonsteroidal anti-inflammatory drugs, immunosuppressants, and glucocorticoids, yet these treatments are frequently associated with adverse events and variable efficacy, particularly with long-term glucocorticoid use. For refractory SLE cases and patients experiencing chronic glucocorticoid-related toxicity, novel therapeutic strategies targeting cuproptosis are urgently required. Although biologic therapies have broadened available treatment options, their high cost and increased infection risk limit widespread clinical application. Its complex pathogenesis and pronounced clinical variability make personalized management strategies highly challenging. Identifying new molecular mechanisms and therapeutic targets, therefore, remains a major focus in SLE research. Recent studies have revealed a newly recognised form of programmed cell death, termed cuproptosis, within SLE-related pathological processes. Copper-mediated cuproptosis is driven by enhanced mitochondrial metabolism and excessive reactive oxygen species accumulation, processes that may promote immune-cell activation and inflammatory injury in SLE. Several key regulators are involved in this pathway, including ferredoxin 1 (FDX1); the lipoic-acid synthesis and protein lipoylation enzymes lipoic acid synthase (LIAS), lipoyltransferase 1 (LIPT1), and dihydrolipoamide dehydrogenase (DLD); pyruvate dehydrogenase complex (PDHC) subunits PDHA1 and PDHB, and dihydrolipoamide S-acetyltransferase (DLAT); as well as additional regulatory factors, including glutaminase (GLS), metal-regulatory transcription factor 1 (MTF1), and cyclin-dependent kinase inhibitor 2A (CDKN2A). This review explores the relationship between cuproptosis and ten associated genes, their roles in dysregulated immune responses, and the emerging opportunities and challenges in developing therapeutic targets and clinical interventions.

items.title: Lupus nephritis outcomes when kidney biopsy is not feasible: findings from a tertiary centre inception cohort.
items.abstract: Baseline kidney biopsy is the gold standard for diagnosing lupus nephritis (LN). However, in certain cases, biopsy may not be feasible due to medical, technical, or patient-related factors, leading to a clinical diagnosis of LN. This study compares outcomes between biopsy-confirmed and clinically diagnosed LN to inform clinical decision-making in scenarios where a kidney biopsy is not feasible. This retrospective study included patients with SLE enrolled between 2000 and 2024 who developed incident LN in an inception cohort at a tertiary centre. Inclusion began in 2000 to reflect treatment changes following the introduction of mycophenolate mofetil. Outcomes included: (1) complete proteinuria recovery (CPR) at 6 months and one year, and (2) a sustained ≥30% eGFR decline, end-stage kidney disease (ESKD), or death (composite outcome). Time-to-event outcomes were assessed using Kaplan-Meier curves and Cox proportional hazards regression. Among 127 patients with incident LN, 84 (66.1%) had biopsy-confirmed and 43 (33.9%) clinically diagnosed LN. Clinically diagnosed patients were younger, with lower baseline proteinuria and disease activity. CPR at 6 months and one year, as well as the composite outcome, did not differ significantly between groups. Individual events, including ≥30% eGFR decline, ESKD, and death, were also not statistically different. Renal outcomes were not statistically different between biopsy-confirmed and clinically diagnosed LN when managed with standard treatment in a tertiary care setting. These findings offer reassurance in cases where biopsy is not feasible; however, biopsy remains the diagnostic gold standard and should be pursued whenever possible.

items.titleZh: 肾活检不可行时的狼疮肾炎结局：来自三级医疗中心初始队列的研究结果
items.abstractZh: 基线肾活检是诊断狼疮肾炎（LN）的金标准。然而，在某些情况下，由于医学、技术或患者相关因素，活检可能不可行，从而导致临床诊断LN。本研究比较了活检确诊和临床诊断LN的结局，以在肾活检不可行的情况下为临床决策提供信息。这项回顾性研究纳入了2000年至2024年间在三级医疗中心初始队列中发生新发LN的SLE患者。纳入从2000年开始，以反映霉酚酸酯引入后的治疗变化。结局包括：（1）6个月和1年时的完全蛋白尿恢复（CPR），以及（2）持续的eGFR下降≥30%、终末期肾病（ESKD）或死亡（复合结局）。使用Kaplan-Meier曲线和Cox比例风险回归评估时间至事件结局。在127名新发LN患者中，84名（66.1%）为活检确诊，43名（33.9%）为临床诊断LN。临床诊断患者更年轻，基线蛋白尿和疾病活动度较低。两组在6个月和1年时的CPR以及复合结局方面无显著差异。单个事件，包括eGFR下降≥30%、ESKD和死亡，也无统计学差异。在三级医疗环境中接受标准治疗时，活检确诊和临床诊断LN的肾脏结局无统计学差异。这些发现为活检不可行的情况提供了 reassurance；然而，活检仍是诊断金标准，应尽可能进行。

items.title: Tumor necrosis factor alpha-induced protein3 rs;10499194 polymorphism enhances presepsin and sCD64 accuracy in differentiating infection from rheumatoid arthritis flare.
items.abstract: Differentiating concurrent general microbial infection from disease flare in Rheumatoid Arthritis (RA) remains challenging. This study evaluated the diagnostic performance of Presepsin and soluble cluster of differentiation 64 (sCD64), and their association with the tumor necrosis factor-alpha-induced protein 3 (TNFAIP3) rs10499194 polymorphism. This case-control study included 90 participants: 30 normal controls, 30 RA without infection, and 30 RA with infection. Serum Presepsin and sCD64 were measured by ELISA, and gene detection for SNP TNFAIP3 rs10499194 (C>T) was performed using the tetra-primer amplification refractory mutation system polymerase chain reaction. Presepsin and sCD64 levels were significantly elevated in the RA with infection group compared to uninfected RA patients and controls (p<0.001). Presepsin (area under the curve, AUC=0.910) and sCD64 (AUC=0.870) outperformed conventional markers (CRP, ESR) in diagnosing infection. The combined biomarkers yielded an AUC of 0.956. The TNFAIP3 T allele was significantly associated with RA susceptibility (OR=2.87, p=0.028). Furthermore, T allele carriers exhibited a dose-dependent, significant increase in both Presepsin (p=0.005) and sCD64 (p=0.013) levels, particularly during infectious episodes. In conclusion, Presepsin and sCD64 are highly accurate biomarkers for distinguishing infection from RA flares. The TNFAIP3 rs10499194 T allele not only increases RA risk but also amplifies the innate immune response during concurrent infections.

items.titleZh: 肿瘤坏死因子α诱导蛋白3 rs10499194多态性增强presepsin和sCD64在区分感染与类风湿关节炎发作中的准确性
items.abstractZh: 区分类风湿关节炎（RA）患者中并发的一般微生物感染与疾病发作仍具挑战性。本研究评估了Presepsin和可溶性分化簇64（sCD64）的诊断性能，以及它们与肿瘤坏死因子α诱导蛋白3（TNFAIP3）rs10499194多态性的关联。这项病例对照研究包括90名参与者：30名正常对照、30名无感染的RA患者和30名有感染的RA患者。通过ELISA测量血清Presepsin和sCD64，并使用四引物扩增难治性突变系统聚合酶链反应检测SNP TNFAIP3 rs10499194（C>T）。与未感染的RA患者和对照组相比，有感染的RA组中Presepsin和sCD64水平显著升高（p<0.001）。Presepsin（曲线下面积，AUC=0.910）和sCD64（AUC=0.870）在诊断感染方面优于传统标志物（CRP、ESR）。联合生物标志物的AUC为0.956。TNFAIP3 T等位基因与RA易感性显著相关（OR=2.87，p=0.028）。此外，T等位基因携带者表现出Presepsin（p=0.005）和sCD64（p=0.013）水平的剂量依赖性显著升高，尤其是在感染期间。总之，Presepsin和sCD64是区分感染与RA发作的高准确性生物标志物。TNFAIP3 rs10499194 T等位基因不仅增加RA风险，还在并发感染期间增强先天免疫反应。

items.title: Serum Sirtuin 1 as a potential indicator of disease activity and severity in systemic lupus erythematosus patients.
items.abstract: The aetiology and pathophysiology of systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE), are yet unclear. Autoantibodies that target various organs and tissues are produced as a result of SLE patients' poor immunological tolerance. Sirtuin-1 (SIRT1) is a histone deacetylase that has a major role in immune responses, apoptosis, and cell differentiation, through alteration of various signalling cascades, including nuclear factor κ-light chain enhancer and activator protein 1 of activated B cells cascades. According to recent data, SIRT1 is an immune system regulator factor, and its impaired action probably play a role in SLE pathogenesis. This study intended to determine whether SIRT1 can be an indicator for SLE severity and activity. This study comprised 30 SLE patients, with a mean age of 28.23 ± 5.21 years and 3.21 ± 1.2 years as duration of the disease. The normal control group consisted of 30 matched adults, aged 27.3±6.22 years (p=0.266). There was a significantly increase in the mean±SD of SIRT1 in SLE patients (28.72±5.83), compared to the control group (22.1±5.59) (p<0.05). Serum SIRT1 was significantly correlated to disease duration, SLEDAI, Katz score, ESR, CRP and renal biopsy classes. However, it was negatively correlated to C3, C4 and there was no correlation with age. A significant elevation was noted in the mean±SD of SIRT1 in active SLE patients (22.7 ± 13.77) compared to inactive SLE patients (6.02±11.27) (p <0.05). Also, the mean±SD of SIRT1 was significantly raised in patients with high SLE disease severity (17.94 ± 15.64) in contrast to those with low SLE disease severity (10.78±13.76) (p<0.05). In conclusion, SIRT1 serum levels were higher in patients with SLE, both with high and low disease severity. Thus, SIRT1 may be a serological indicator for the severity and activity of SLE.

items.titleZh: 血清Sirtuin 1作为系统性红斑狼疮患者疾病活动性和严重程度的潜在指标
items.abstractZh: 系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）的病因和病理生理学尚不清楚。SLE患者免疫耐受性差，导致产生针对各种器官和组织的自身抗体。Sirtuin-1（SIRT1）是一种组蛋白去乙酰化酶，通过改变多种信号级联反应，包括核因子κ轻链增强子和活化B细胞激活蛋白1级联反应，在免疫反应、凋亡和细胞分化中发挥重要作用。根据最近的数据，SIRT1是免疫系统调节因子，其功能受损可能在SLE发病机制中起作用。本研究旨在确定SIRT1是否可以作为SLE严重程度和活动性的指标。本研究包括30名SLE患者，平均年龄为28.23±5.21岁，病程为3.21±1.2年。正常对照组由30名匹配的成年人组成，年龄为27.3±6.22岁（p=0.266）。SLE患者SIRT1的平均值±SD（28.72±5.83）显著高于对照组（22.1±5.59）（p<0.05）。血清SIRT1与病程、SLEDAI、Katz评分、ESR、CRP和肾活检分级显著相关。然而，它与C3、C4呈负相关，与年龄无相关性。活动性SLE患者SIRT1的平均值±SD（22.7±13.77）显著高于非活动性SLE患者（6.02±11.27）（p<0.05）。此外，高SLE疾病严重程度患者SIRT1的平均值±SD（17.94±15.64）显著高于低SLE疾病严重程度患者（10.78±13.76）（p<0.05）。总之，SLE患者血清SIRT1水平升高，无论疾病严重程度高低。因此，SIRT1可能是SLE严重程度和活动性的血清学指标。

items.title: Refractory mastoiditis as the initial manifestation of granulomatosis with polyangiitis:a case report and literature review.
items.abstract: Granulomatosis with Polyangiitis (GPA) is an antineutrophil cytoplasmic antibody (ANCA)-associated vasculitis that predominantly affects the upper or lower respiratory tracts and the kidney. While otologic involvement is relatively common in GPA, isolated destructive mastoiditis as the initial manifestation is exceedingly rare, often leading to misdiagnosis. A 69-year-old female presented with a 3-months history of progressive bilateral hearing loss and otorrhea. Based on clinical and radiological findings, she was initially diagnosed with acute mastoiditis but showed no response to antibiotic therapy. She subsequently underwent right sided canal-wall-up mastoidectomy; however, postoperative symptoms persisted, and pathological examination only revealed inflammatory granulation tissue. Her condition further deteriorated, with the development of contralateral ear involvement and persistent low-grade fever. Serological testing eventually showed a proteinase 3 antineutrophil cytoplasmic antibodies (PR3-ANCA) level>200 RU/mL and chest computed tomography (CT) demonstrated multiple bilateral pulmonary nodules. The patient was thus diagnosed with GPA and initiated on methylprednisolone pulse therapy, followed by rituximab (RTX). This case highlights that, in patients with refractory mastoiditis unresponsive to conventional antibiotics and surgical intervention, otolaryngologists should maintain a high index of suspicion for underlying systemic vasculitides and initiate early ANCA testing. Such measures are critical to avoid diagnostic delays and prevent irreversible organ damage.

items.titleZh: 难治性乳突炎作为肉芽肿性多血管炎的首发表现：病例报告及文献复习
items.abstractZh: 肉芽肿性多血管炎（GPA）是一种抗中性粒细胞胞浆抗体（ANCA）相关性血管炎，主要影响上或下呼吸道及肾脏。虽然耳部受累在GPA中相对常见，但孤立性破坏性乳突炎作为首发表现极为罕见，常导致误诊。一例69岁女性患者出现进行性双侧听力下降和耳漏3个月。根据临床和影像学表现，她最初被诊断为急性乳突炎，但对抗生素治疗无反应。随后接受了右侧保留外耳道壁的乳突切除术，但术后症状持续存在，病理检查仅显示炎性肉芽组织。病情进一步恶化，出现对侧耳受累和持续性低热。血清学检测最终显示蛋白酶3抗中性粒细胞胞浆抗体（PR3-ANCA）水平>200 RU/mL，胸部计算机断层扫描（CT）显示双肺多发结节。因此患者被诊断为GPA，并开始甲泼尼龙冲击治疗，随后使用利妥昔单抗（RTX）。本病例强调，对于常规抗生素和手术治疗无效的难治性乳突炎患者，耳鼻喉科医生应高度怀疑潜在的系统性血管炎，并尽早进行ANCA检测。这些措施对于避免诊断延迟和预防不可逆的器官损伤至关重要。

items.title: ICAM signaling rewires the inflammatory communication network in pediatric gout.
items.abstract: The immune regulatory characteristics and core inflammatory signaling networks of pediatric gout have not been fully elucidated. The prevailing view of generalized immune hyperactivation cannot precisely explain the unique immune pathological features of pediatric gout, highlighting an urgent research gap to be addressed. To clarify the immune regulatory mechanism of pediatric gout, we performed single-cell transcriptomic profiling and systematic cell-cell interaction analysis on peripheral blood samples collected from pediatric gout patients and healthy controls. We comprehensively compared the intercellular communication networks, signaling pathway activities, and molecular expression patterns between the two groups, and focused on the differential inflammatory signaling axes dominating pediatric gout pathogenesis. Different from the traditional view of global immune hyperactivation, pediatric gout exhibited a highly selective remodeling of circulating immune networks. The ICAM signaling pathway was identified as the most dominant and disease-specific inflammatory axis in pediatric gout. In the immune communication network, platelets served as the major signal-emitting hubs with significantly enhanced signaling activity in patients, while CD14 + monocytes acted as the primary signal recipients. Selective upregulation of ICAM1 was detected in CD14 + monocytes of pediatric gout patients, which endowed monocytes with strengthened signal -receiving capacity. Notably, other classic immune pathways showed no significant differences between patients and healthy controls. This study demonstrates that pediatric gout is characterized by directional and selective immune crosstalk rather than universal immune activation. The ICAM-centered inflammatory interactome is the core driver of immune network remodeling in pediatric gout. These findings complement and advance previous single-cell research on adult gout, and identify the ICAM signaling pathway as a novel and promising therapeutic target for the precise clinical intervention of pediatric gout.
