items.titleZh: 73岁痛风石性痛风合并前列腺癌及慢性肾病患者对firsekibart的临床应答：一例病例报告
items.abstractZh: 老年多合并症患者急性痛风发作的管理仍是重大临床挑战。尽管白细胞介素-1β（IL-1β）抑制剂被推荐用于常规治疗不适用时的难治性痛风，但其在活动性恶性肿瘤和中重度肾功能损害患者中的应用证据仍然有限。本病例填补了在复杂肿瘤和肾脏风险中平衡强效抗炎治疗的知识空白。我们报告一例73岁男性患者，患有难治性痛风，病程超过20年，并伴有广泛痛风石形成。患者同时诊断为前列腺腺泡腺癌、3期慢性肾病（CKD）、冠状动脉疾病和3级高血压。由于反复急性痛风发作、肾功能受损及高出血风险，标准抗炎治疗方案存在禁忌。在全面评估潜在风险和获益后，开始使用firsekibart（一种靶向IL-1β的新型全人源单克隆抗体）治疗，单次皮下注射200 mg，联合短期低剂量糖皮质激素。随后引入非布司他进行降尿酸治疗。治疗后24小时内观察到关节疼痛和肿胀显著缓解。在3个月随访期间，炎症标志物显著改善，高敏C反应蛋白从62.36 mg/L降至0.9 mg/L。达到目标血清尿酸水平（444.9 µmol/L），肾功能改善，估算肾小球滤过率从36.4 mL/min/1.73 m²升至44.9 mL/min/1.73 m²。随访期间未观察到肿瘤进展、严重感染或主要心血管不良事件。本病例提示，在标准治疗受限的高危痛风人群中，firsekibart可能提供快速有效的炎症控制。这些发现凸显了IL-1β靶向治疗作为复杂患者精准医学方法的潜力；然而，需要更大规模的前瞻性研究来验证firsekibart在该人群中的长期肿瘤和肾脏安全性。

items.title: Developing a patient-educator program for adolescents with juvenile arthritis: exploring motivation sources, barriers, and facilitators.
items.abstract: Patients can be valuable contributors to medical education, offering nuanced perspective and guidance, based on lived experience. While numerous training programs have integrated adult patients in this manner, very few have engaged adolescent patients. Recognizing adolescent educators may be particularly helpful in teaching pediatric conditions, this study appraises the potential for including those with juvenile arthritis in pediatric rheumatology training. Using an exploratory qualitative approach, we conducted semi-structured interviews with adolescents with juvenile arthritis receiving treatment at two tertiary-care pediatric centres in Canada about the motivations, perceptions, facilitators, and barriers that influence their engagement as patient educators. The interview transcripts were analyzed using an iterative qualitative descriptive method. Participants ( n = 19, aged 13-18) identified intrinsic factors, such as learning about their condition and socializing with peers, and extrinsic factors, such as helping students learn and promoting greater disease awareness, as relevant drivers for participating as patient educators. They pointed to balancing school and medical appointments, transportation, and discomfort with sharing personal experiences in large groups as barriers. Parental support, accruing volunteer hours, and engaging health professionals in the teaching sessions were seen as facilitators that could meaningfully enhance the relevance and impact of adolescents' contributions to medical education. Adolescents with juvenile arthritis are motivated to participate as patient educators. Understanding the factors that promote their involvement supports the development of training initiatives involving adolescents that are likely to be successful and sustainable. Les patients peuvent apporter une contribution précieuse à la formation médicale, en offrant une perspective nuancée et des conseils fondés sur leur expérience vécue. Si de nombreux programmes de formation ont intégré des patients adultes de cette manière, très peu ont fait appel à des patients adolescents. Reconnaissant que les adolescents éducateurs peuvent être particulièrement utiles pour enseigner les pathologies pédiatriques, cette étude évalue le potentiel d’inclure des adolescents atteints d’arthrite juvénile dans la formation en rhumatologie pédiatrique. À l’aide d’une approche qualitative exploratoire, nous avons mené des entretiens semi-structurés auprès d’adolescents atteints d’arthrite juvénile et suivis dans deux centres pédiatriques de soins tertiaires au Canada, afin d’évaluer les motivations, les perceptions, les facteurs facilitants et les obstacles qui influencent leur engagement en tant que patients-éducateurs. Les transcriptions des entretiens ont été analysées à l’aide d’une méthode descriptive qualitative itérative. Les participants (n = 19, âgés de 13 à 18 ans) ont identifié des facteurs intrinsèques, tels que l’apprentissage de leur pathologie et la socialisation avec leurs pairs, ainsi que des facteurs extrinsèques, tels que le fait d’aider les étudiants à apprendre et de promouvoir une meilleure sensibilisation à la maladie, comme des motivations pertinentes pour participer en tant que patients-éducateurs. Ils ont cité comme obstacles la conciliation entre l’école et les rendez-vous médicaux, les problèmes de transport et la gêne liée au partage d’expériences personnelles au sein de grands groupes. Le soutien parental, l’accumulation d’heures de bénévolat et l’implication de professionnels de santé dans les séances pédagogiques ont été considérés comme des facteurs facilitants susceptibles d’améliorer de manière significative la pertinence et l’impact de la contribution des adolescents à la formation médicale. Les adolescents atteints d’arthrite juvénile sont motivés à participer en tant que patients-éducateurs. La compréhension des facteurs favorisant leur implication contribue à l’élaboration d’initiatives de formation impliquant des adolescents, qui ont de bonnes chances d’être couronnées de succès et durables. .

items.titleZh: 为青少年关节炎患者开发患者教育者项目：探索动机来源、障碍和促进因素。
items.abstractZh: 患者可以为医学教育做出宝贵贡献，基于生活经验提供细致入微的视角和指导。虽然许多培训项目以这种方式整合了成年患者，但很少有项目涉及青少年患者。认识到青少年教育者在教授儿科疾病方面可能特别有帮助，本研究评估了将青少年关节炎患者纳入儿科风湿病学培训的潜力。采用探索性定性方法，我们对在加拿大两个三级儿科中心接受治疗的青少年关节炎患者进行了半结构化访谈，探讨影响他们作为患者教育者参与的动机、看法、促进因素和障碍。访谈记录采用迭代定性描述方法进行分析。参与者（n=19，年龄13-18岁）确定了内在因素，如了解自身状况和与同龄人社交，以及外在因素，如帮助学生学习和促进疾病意识提高，作为参与患者教育者的相关驱动因素。他们指出平衡学校与医疗预约、交通以及在大群体中分享个人经历的不适感是障碍。家长支持、积累志愿者小时数以及让卫生专业人员参与教学课程被视为促进因素，这些因素可以显著提高青少年对医学教育贡献的相关性和影响力。青少年关节炎患者有动力作为患者教育者参与。理解促进他们参与的因素有助于制定涉及青少年的培训计划，这些计划可能成功且可持续。

items.title: Dermatomyositis With Necrotizing Vasculitis, Pulmonary Arterial Hypertension, and Extensive Calcinosis Following Delayed Diagnosis.
items.abstract: Dermatomyositis is a rare autoimmune inflammatory disease with a highly heterogeneous clinical presentation and potential for multisystem involvement. Early diagnosis may be challenging, particularly in patients presenting with amyopathic disease and limited initial laboratory abnormalities. We report the case of a 45-year-old woman initially diagnosed with amyopathic dermatomyositis based on characteristic cutaneous manifestations in the absence of objective muscle involvement on laboratory testing and electromyography. After being lost to follow-up for four years, she presented with progressive proximal muscle weakness, extensive ulcerative calcinosis, Raynaud phenomenon, and exertional dyspnea. Extended myositis serology revealed anti-Mi-2 and anti-signal recognition particle (SRP) antibodies. Muscle biopsy demonstrated perifascicular atrophy, necrotizing vasculitis, and foreign-body granulomatous inflammation associated with dystrophic calcinosis. Right heart catheterization confirmed pre-capillary pulmonary arterial hypertension in the absence of interstitial lung disease. The patient was treated with intravenous cyclophosphamide, pulmonary vasodilator therapy, colchicine, and tapering corticosteroids, resulting in clinical and functional improvement. This case highlights the potential progression of initially amyopathic dermatomyositis to severe systemic disease, the limitations of isolated serological assessment, and the importance of long-term follow-up. It also illustrates several uncommon manifestations of adult dermatomyositis, including extensive calcinosis, pulmonary arterial hypertension, and histologically proven necrotizing vasculitis, supporting the concept of dermatomyositis as a systemic vasculopathic disorder.

items.titleZh: 延迟诊断后出现坏死性血管炎、肺动脉高压和广泛钙化的皮肌炎
items.abstractZh: 皮肌炎是一种罕见的自身免疫性炎症性疾病，临床表现高度异质，可能累及多个系统。早期诊断可能具有挑战性，尤其是在表现为无肌病性皮肌炎且初始实验室检查异常有限的病例中。我们报告一例45岁女性患者，最初根据特征性皮肤表现，在实验室检查和肌电图未发现客观肌肉受累的情况下，诊断为无肌病性皮肌炎。失访四年后，她出现进行性近端肌无力、广泛溃疡性钙质沉着、雷诺现象和劳力性呼吸困难。扩展的肌炎血清学检测显示抗Mi-2和抗信号识别颗粒（SRP）抗体阳性。肌肉活检显示束周萎缩、坏死性血管炎以及与营养不良性钙化相关的异物肉芽肿性炎症。右心导管检查证实存在毛细血管前性肺动脉高压，且无间质性肺病。患者接受静脉环磷酰胺、肺血管扩张剂治疗、秋水仙碱和逐渐减量的皮质类固醇治疗，临床和功能得到改善。本病例强调了最初无肌病性皮肌炎可能进展为严重系统性疾病的潜在风险、孤立血清学评估的局限性以及长期随访的重要性。同时，它也展示了成人皮肌炎的几种罕见表现，包括广泛钙质沉着、肺动脉高压和组织学证实的坏死性血管炎，支持皮肌炎作为一种系统性血管病变的概念。

items.title: Atypical Lower Extremity Discoid Lupus Erythematosus Associated With Newly Diagnosed Systemic Lupus Erythematosus in a Male Patient: A Case Report.
items.abstract: Discoid lupus erythematosus (DLE) classically affects sun‑exposed areas, such as the face, scalp, and ears. Involvement of the lower extremities is uncommon, and presentation of DLE in association with systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) in a male patient is relatively rare. This case report describes a 34‑year‑old man who presented with chronic, scaly, dyspigmented plaques confined to both the lower legs, which prompted further evaluation and led to the diagnosis of SLE. Histopathological evaluation supported the diagnosis of DLE, while serologic workup revealed high‑titer antinuclear antibodies (ANAs), anti‑double‑stranded DNA (anti‑dsDNA), anti‑Smith antibodies, and hypocomplementemia, supporting a diagnosis of SLE with chronic cutaneous lupus involvement. Following treatment with strict photoprotection, topical corticosteroids, and weight‑based hydroxychloroquine, the patient showed marked clinical and serologic improvement at the 12‑week and 9‑month follow‑ups. This case highlights the importance of evaluating for systemic involvement in patients with biopsy‑supported DLE, particularly when lesions occur in atypical anatomical locations and in populations traditionally considered at lower risk.

items.titleZh: 男性患者新诊断系统性红斑狼疮相关的非典型下肢盘状红斑狼疮：一例病例报告
items.abstractZh: 盘状红斑狼疮（DLE）典型累及日光暴露区域，如面部、头皮和耳朵。下肢受累不常见，且男性患者中DLE与系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）同时出现相对罕见。本病例报告描述了一名34岁男性，表现为局限于双下肢的慢性、鳞屑性、色素异常斑块，这促使进一步评估并最终诊断为SLE。组织病理学评估支持DLE诊断，而血清学检查显示高滴度抗核抗体（ANA）、抗双链DNA（抗dsDNA）、抗Smith抗体及低补体血症，支持SLE伴慢性皮肤狼疮受累的诊断。经过严格光防护、外用糖皮质激素及基于体重的羟氯喹治疗后，患者在12周和9个月随访时显示出显著的临床和血清学改善。本病例强调了在活检证实的DLE患者中评估系统性受累的重要性，尤其是当皮损出现在非典型解剖部位且患者属于传统认为低风险人群时。

items.title: [A case of eosinophilic granulomatosis with polyangiitis presenting with characteristic endoscopic findings in the esophagus and stomach].
items.abstract: A woman in her 60s presented with abdominal pain and diarrhea. She had a history of asthma and sinusitis and developed a skin rash and numbness in the lower extremities. Laboratory tests revealed marked eosinophilia, leading to a diagnosis of eosinophilic granulomatosis with polyangiitis (EGPA). Esophagogastroduodenoscopy showed longitudinal erosion in the thoracic esophagus and mucosal color changes ranging from pale to bronze tones in the stomach, extending from the antrum to the angular region. These changes became more evident with insufflation and were not accompanied by inflammatory changes in the mucosa. Given the rarity of reports of esophageal and gastric involvement in EGPA, and to our knowledge, no case has demonstrated insufflation-dependent mucosal changes, this case is noteworthy.

items.titleZh: [一例以食管和胃特征性内镜表现为表现的嗜酸性肉芽肿性多血管炎病例]。
items.abstractZh: 一名60多岁女性因腹痛和腹泻就诊。她有哮喘和鼻窦炎病史，并出现皮疹和下肢麻木。实验室检查显示显著嗜酸性粒细胞增多，诊断为嗜酸性肉芽肿性多血管炎（EGPA）。食管胃十二指肠镜检查显示胸段食管纵向糜烂，以及胃内从胃窦到胃角区域黏膜颜色从苍白到青铜色的变化。这些变化在充气时更加明显，且不伴有黏膜炎症改变。鉴于EGPA累及食管和胃的报道罕见，且据我们所知，尚无病例显示充气依赖性黏膜变化，因此本病例值得关注。

items.title: Janus kinase inhibitors are of limited use in refractory JIA-associated uveitis: retrospective data from a tertiary uveitis center.
items.abstract: Juvenile idiopathic arthritis-associated uveitis (JIAU) frequently follows a chronic and complicated course. Janus kinase inhibitors (JAKi) represent a promising new therapeutic option. Retrospective monocentric analysis of 20 children with chronic anterior JIAU treated with tofacitinib (n = 18), baricitinib (n = 1) or upadacitinib (n = 1). uveitis or arthritis inactivity at any time during follow-up, recurrences after achieving inactivity, sparing of medication, occurrence of new ocular complications, resolution of preexisting macular edema. All patients had received methotrexate prior to baseline, and at least two biologics had been ineffective in 18/20 patients. Whilst receiving JAKi medication, uveitis was inactive in eight patients (anterior chamber cell count < 0.5+) at any time during follow-up (mean 9.2 ± 3.3 months), but uveitis relapsed in 6 of them subsequently. In 7 patients, treatment was terminated after ≤ 1 year due to inadequate response of ocular inflammation. During follow-up, new uveitis-related complications occurred in 7 patients (9 eyes), the most frequent were macular edema (8 eyes of 7 patients), and ocular hypertension (5 eyes of 3 patients). Reduction of concomitant systemic medication was possible in 3/14 patients. Any reduction of topical steroids during follow-up was possible in 24/30 eyes, and 23/30 eyes received a lower dose at the last follow-up than they did at baseline. Our data show limited effectiveness of JAKi treatment in patients with chronic DMARD-refractory JIAU. The number of patients in whom uveitis quiescence could be observed was low, as was the possibility for reduction of concomitant medication, and the relapse rate was high. Not applicable.

items.title: Patient reports of evaluations for interstitial lung disease in patients with connective tissue diseases and rheumatoid arthritis: an international survey.
items.abstract: Connective tissue diseases (CTDs) and rheumatoid arthritis (RA) share the pulmonary complication of interstitial lung disease (ILD). However, real-world data on patient perspectives and experience regarding screening and evaluations for ILD following CTD/RA diagnosis are limited. We conducted an international, cross-sectional online survey of patients self-reporting as having confirmed CTDs and RA to understand their experience of lung manifestations and ILD screening and/or evaluations. Respondents aged ≥18 years with self-reported CTDs/RA with and without ILD were engaged across Africa and Turkey, Europe, Japan and the Americas. Of 2,225 respondents, 54% were from Europe and 82% were female. Mean ± standard deviation (SD) age was 55 ± 11.6 years. Mean (SD) time from first symptoms to diagnosis with CTD/RA was 14.78 ± 11.37 years. On average, respondents experienced a delay of about 2 years before they were diagnosed with CTD/RA after experiencing their first symptoms. Mean (SD) time from CTD/RA diagnosis to diagnosis with lung conditions was 9.61 ± 10.09 years. Lung screening/evaluations were reported to have been done by 70% of all respondents, mostly as a general or routine status check (39%). Chest high-resolution computed tomography (HRCT) and pulmonary function tests (PFTs) were the most recalled tests to evaluate the lungs for ILD (both 50%), especially among respondents with systemic sclerosis (73% and 87%, respectively). Among respondents who recalled lung evaluation by chest HRCT scan or PFTs, tests were carried out every 1-2 years. Most survey respondents (87%) rated lung screening/evaluations as important. The survey demonstrated mixed experiences of evaluations for lung manifestations and ILD among patients with CTDs/RA, attributable to differences in the risk of developing ILD and limited clinical guidance for evaluating for ILD in CTDs/RA. Despite their mixed experiences, most respondents showed a positive attitude towards lung evaluations, which could be leveraged to ensure regular, proactive screening and evaluation for ILD to improve patient outcomes. Overall, findings from this survey highlight opportunities to improve physician awareness and standardisation of practice for enhanced patient care.

items.titleZh: 患者关于结缔组织病和类风湿关节炎间质性肺病评估的报告：一项国际调查
items.abstractZh: 结缔组织病（CTDs）和类风湿关节炎（RA）共有间质性肺病（ILD）这一肺部并发症。然而，关于CTD/RA诊断后患者对ILD筛查和评估的看法及经历的真实世界数据有限。我们进行了一项国际横断面在线调查，对象为自我报告确诊CTD和RA的患者，以了解其肺部表现及ILD筛查和/或评估的经历。受访者为年龄≥18岁、自我报告患有CTD/RA（伴或不伴ILD）的患者，来自非洲、土耳其、欧洲、日本和美洲。在2,225名受访者中，54%来自欧洲，82%为女性。平均年龄±标准差（SD）为55±11.6岁。从首次症状到CTD/RA诊断的平均（SD）时间为14.78±11.37年。平均而言，受访者在出现首次症状后约延迟2年才被诊断为CTD/RA。从CTD/RA诊断到肺部疾病诊断的平均（SD）时间为9.61±10.09年。70%的受访者报告曾进行过肺部筛查/评估，其中大多数为一般或常规状态检查（39%）。胸部高分辨率计算机断层扫描（HRCT）和肺功能检查（PFTs）是最常被回忆起的评估肺部ILD的检查（均为50%），尤其是在系统性硬化症患者中（分别为73%和87%）。在回忆起通过胸部HRCT扫描或PFTs进行肺部评估的受访者中，检查每1-2年进行一次。大多数调查受访者（87%）认为肺部筛查/评估很重要。该调查显示，CTD/RA患者对肺部表现和ILD的评估经历不一，这归因于发生ILD风险的差异以及CTD/RA中ILD评估的临床指导有限。尽管经历不一，大多数受访者对肺部评估持积极态度，这可用于确保定期、主动的ILD筛查和评估，以改善患者预后。总体而言，本调查结果强调了提高医生意识和实践标准化以改善患者护理的机会。

items.title: Gender inequities in the economic burden of anxiety disorders, depressive disorders, migraine, and rheumatoid arthritis in Mexico, 2005-2021.
items.abstract: Anxiety disorders, depressive disorders, migraine, and rheumatoid arthritis are common chronic conditions that contribute substantially to disability, recurrent care needs, and productivity losses, yet remain comparatively under-prioritised in health policy. In Mexico, these conditions disproportionately affect women, but their economic burden has not been comprehensively quantified from a gender perspective. To estimate the direct and indirect economic burden of anxiety disorders, depressive disorders, migraine, and rheumatoid arthritis in Mexico among adults aged 20 years and older between 2005 and 2021, from a societal perspective and by gender. We conducted a cost-of-illness analysis from a societal perspective. Direct costs were estimated by combining condition-specific prevalence from the Global Burden of Disease Study 2021 (GBD 2021) with normative per-case treatment costs derived from national clinical guidelines and official cost sources. Indirect costs were valued using three complementary approaches: the Human Capital Approach (HCA), based on predicted annual labour income from nationally representative employment surveys; a GDP-per-capita benchmark (1 DALY = 1 GDP per capita); and a willingness-to-pay approach using the value of a statistical life year (VSLY) transferred to Mexico following OECD methods. All costs were expressed in 2021 international dollars (Int$). Between 2005 and 2021, the four disorders accounted for 28.8 million DALYs lost. Migraine was the most prevalent condition, but depressive disorders generated the highest direct costs (Int$310.5 billion) and the largest share of indirect costs (41.1%). Indirect costs totalled Int$106.8 billion under the HCA, Int$582.2 billion under the GDP-per-capita valuation, and Int$2.9 trillion under the willingness-to-pay approach. Under the GDP-per-capita benchmark, the combined economic burden of the four disorders reached approximately Int$1.2 trillion over the study period. Women consistently bore a greater burden than men across all four conditions and under all valuation methods; total indirect costs borne by women were 2.0 times higher for anxiety disorders, 2.1 times higher for depressive disorders, 2.2 times higher for migraine, and 3.8 times higher for rheumatoid arthritis. Anxiety disorders, depressive disorders, migraine, and rheumatoid arthritis impose a substantial and unequally distributed economic burden in Mexico. The persistent excess burden among women indicates that these high-disability chronic disorders should be understood not only as a public health problem, but also as a health equity concern. More gender-responsive priority setting, stronger continuity of care, and better financial protection may help reduce both disability and its downstream economic consequences in Mexico and other LMICs with segmented health systems.

items.title: Evolution of direct and indirect costs of rheumatoid arthritis and related conditions in France: a 2015-2023 nation-wide population-based study.
items.abstract: Rheumatoid arthritis (RA) is a chronic inflammatory disease associated with substantial healthcare utilization and productivity losses. Advances in RA management may have modified its economic burden. Our aim was to describe the evolution of direct and indirect costs of RA and related conditions in France between 2015 and 2023, using nationwide data. We conducted a retrospective population-based study using the National Health Data System (SNDS), covering nearly the entire French population. Patients with RA or related conditions were identified using validated algorithms. Annual reimbursed expenditures including direct medical costs (hospitalizations, outpatient care, medications) and indirect costs (daily allowances, disability benefits, annuities) were analyzed. The number of patients with RA increased by 26% between 2015 and 2023, from 265,270 to 334,290 individuals. Total reimbursed expenditures increased in similar proportions, from euro885.9 million to euro1,118.3 million, resulting in stable mean costs of euro3345 per patient per year, in 2023. However, medication costs increased disproportionately compared with overall spending, rising from euro404.3 million in 2015 to euro563.9 million in 2023 (+39%). Until 2019, hospitalizations and outpatient consultations in the public sector constituted the second largest expenditure category after medications. However, from 2020 onward, indirect costs emerged as the second largest component and increased strongly over the study period (+48%). The economic burden of RA in France has grown substantially, with a shift toward higher medication and indirect costs. These findings highlight the importance of incorporating productivity losses into economic evaluations to better inform healthcare policy and resource allocation.

items.title: Systemic juvenile idiopathic arthritis: are there any predictors of disease course?
items.abstract: Systemic juvenile idiopathic arthritis (sJIA) is an autoinflammatory disorder with a variable disease course presenting either as monophasic or non-monophasic (polycyclic or persistent) course. Identifying clinical and laboratory features at presentation predicting these trajectories may guide early therapeutic decisions. This study aimed to evaluate predictors of disease course in children. We conducted a retrospective observational study of children with sJIA over 18 years. Clinical features, laboratory parameters, treatment and disease outcomes were reviewed. Children with sJIA were classified as having monophasic, polycyclic or persistent disease based on clinical course. Logistic regression analysis, adjusted for age, gender, year of diagnosis, was performed to evaluate predictors of non-monophasic disease. Eighty children with sJIA were included, median age at diagnosis was 8 years (IQR 3.5-11) with median follow-up of 6 years (IQR 3-10). 34 (42.5%) monophasic, 8 (10%) polycyclic, and 38(47.5%) had persistent course. Rash (83.8%) followed by arthritis (66.3%) were most common presenting features, while macrophage activation syndrome (MAS) occurred in 18.8%. Polyarthritis at presentation was independently associated with non-monophasic disease (OR 12.68, 95% CI 2.69-59.90, p = 0.001). There was weak evidence to support an association between the clinical features and laboratory parameters, including MAS at presentation and disease trajectory. sJIA is heterogenous and difficult to predict disease course at initial presentation. Polyarthritis identified children at high risk of a non-monophasic disease course in this study population. Early identification of these high-risk children may support timely escalation of targeted biologic therapy and improved long-term outcomes.

items.titleZh: 系统性幼年特发性关节炎：是否存在病程预测因素？
items.abstractZh: 系统性幼年特发性关节炎（sJIA）是一种自身炎症性疾病，病程多变，可表现为单相或非单相（多相或持续）病程。识别发病时预测这些病程轨迹的临床和实验室特征可能有助于早期治疗决策。本研究旨在评估儿童病程的预测因素。我们对18年间患有sJIA的儿童进行了一项回顾性观察研究。回顾了临床特征、实验室参数、治疗和疾病结局。根据临床病程将sJIA儿童分为单相、多相或持续性疾病。进行逻辑回归分析，校正年龄、性别、诊断年份，以评估非单相疾病的预测因素。共纳入80名sJIA儿童，诊断时中位年龄为8岁（IQR 3.5-11），中位随访时间为6年（IQR 3-10）。34例（42.5%）为单相，8例（10%）为多相，38例（47.5%）为持续病程。皮疹（83.8%）和关节炎（66.3%）是最常见的首发特征，而巨噬细胞活化综合征（MAS）发生率为18.8%。发病时多关节炎与非单相疾病独立相关（OR 12.68，95% CI 2.69-59.90，p = 0.001）。临床特征和实验室参数（包括发病时MAS）与疾病轨迹之间的关联证据较弱。sJIA具有异质性，在初次发病时难以预测病程。在本研究人群中，多关节炎识别出非单相疾病病程高风险儿童。早期识别这些高风险儿童可能有助于及时升级靶向生物治疗并改善长期结局。

items.title: Assessing the mortality burden after acute myocardial infarction in systemic lupus erythematosus: insights from the MINAP Registry.
items.abstract: Acute myocardial infarction (AMI) is a leading cause of mortality globally. Although SLE is known to increase the risk of AMI, its impact on long-term outcomes following AMI in contemporary populations remains poorly defined. To determine whether individuals with SLE experience higher long-term mortality after AMI compared with those without SLE. Adults hospitalised with AMI between January 2005 and March 2019 were identified from the Myocardial Ischaemia National Audit Project registry and linked with Hospital Episode Statistics and Office for National Statistics mortality records. Long-term all-cause and cardiovascular mortality were assessed up to 5 years post-AMI. Of 784,091 patients with AMI, 715 (0.1%) had a diagnosis of SLE. Patients with SLE were younger (median 63.9 vs. 70.3 years; P<0.001) and more often female (76% vs. 34%; P<0.001). Adjusted all-cause mortality was higher among those with SLE from 30 days (HR 1.62; 95% CI 1.23, 2.12; P=0.001) to 5 years (HR 1.84; 95% CI 1.63, 2.09; P<0.001). Adjusted cardiovascular mortality was similarly elevated at 30 days (HR 1.63; 95% CI 1.20-2.21; P=0.002) and 5 years (HR 1.75; 95% CI 1.46-2.10; P<0.001). Individuals with SLE have a persistently higher risk of all-cause and cardiovascular mortality following AMI, despite being younger and having less traditional cardiovascular comorbidities. These findings highlight SLE as an independent determinant of adverse post-AMI outcomes and support aggressive, guideline-directed secondary prevention in this high-risk population.

items.titleZh: 评估系统性红斑狼疮患者急性心肌梗死后的死亡负担：来自MINAP注册研究的见解
items.abstractZh: 急性心肌梗死（AMI）是全球死亡的主要原因。尽管已知系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）会增加AMI风险，但其对当代人群中AMI后长期结局的影响仍不明确。本研究旨在确定SLE患者与非SLE患者相比，AMI后是否经历更高的长期死亡率。从心肌缺血国家审计项目注册库中识别2005年1月至2019年3月期间因AMI住院的成人，并与医院事件统计和英国国家统计局死亡记录相关联。评估AMI后长达5年的长期全因死亡率和心血管死亡率。在784,091例AMI患者中，715例（0.1%）诊断为SLE。SLE患者更年轻（中位年龄63.9岁 vs. 70.3岁；P<0.001），且女性比例更高（76% vs. 34%；P<0.001）。从30天（HR 1.62；95% CI 1.23, 2.12；P=0.001）到5年（HR 1.84；95% CI 1.63, 2.09；P<0.001），SLE患者的校正全因死亡率均更高。校正心血管死亡率在30天（HR 1.63；95% CI 1.20-2.21；P=0.002）和5年（HR 1.75；95% CI 1.46-2.10；P<0.001）也类似升高。尽管SLE患者更年轻且传统心血管合并症较少，但AMI后全因和心血管死亡风险持续较高。这些发现突显SLE是AMI后不良结局的独立决定因素，并支持在这一高危人群中采取积极的、指南指导的二级预防。

items.title: Comparative Efficacy and Safety of Telitacicept vs. Belimumab in Systemic Lupus Erythematosus: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
items.abstract: This study was designed to assess the comparative efficacy and safety of telitacicept and belimumab in adult patients diagnosed with systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE). We systematically searched MEDLINE, Embase, and Web of Science from database inception through March 2026 to identify retrospective observational studies comparing telitacicept and belimumab in adult patients with SLE. A meta-analysis was conducted to pool efficacy data, reporting odds ratios (ORs) and 95% confidence intervals (CIs) for treatment response. The study protocol was registered with the International Prospective Register of Systematic Reviews (PROSPERO; Registration No. CRD420261420984). Out of 215 records screened, five studies (676 patients; 340 receiving telitacicept and 336 receiving belimumab) met the inclusion criteria following full-text assessment. Telitacicept was associated with significantly improved rates of Lupus Low Disease Activity State (LLDAS) at 24 weeks (OR = 1.87, 95% CI = 1.03-3.39, p = 0.041; 2 studies, I² = 0%, p = 0.92) and complete renal response at 24 weeks (OR = 2.38, 95% CI = 1.10-5.15, p = 0.027; 2 studies, I² = 0%, p = 0.88) compared to belimumab, utilizing fixed-effects models due to absence of heterogeneity. The Systemic Lupus Erythematosus Responder Index-4 (SRI-4) response at 24 weeks (OR = 2.02, 95% CI = 1.04-3.91, p = 0.038; 1 study) and complete renal response at 52 weeks (OR = 2.67, 95% CI = 1.17-6.09, p = 0.019; 1 study) were also significantly greater with telitacicept. Prednisone tapering to ≤7.5 mg/day at 24 weeks approached statistical significance (OR = 1.56, 95% CI = 1.00-2.43, p = 0.049; 1 study). Analysis of safety endpoints showed no statistically significant differences between groups for overall adverse events (OR = 1.21, 95% CI = 0.96-1.53, p = 0.088; 3 studies, I² = 0%, p = 0.95), or serious adverse events (OR = 0.68, 95% CI = 0.43-1.08, p = 0.072; 2 studies, I² = 0%, p = 0.89). Telitacicept suggests greater efficacy over belimumab in achieving LLDAS, SRI-4 response, complete renal response, and reduction in prednisone dosage in patients with SLE, without notable differences in rates of adverse events, serious adverse events, or infections.

items.titleZh: 泰它西普与贝利木单抗治疗系统性红斑狼疮的疗效和安全性比较：系统评价和荟萃分析
items.abstractZh: 本研究旨在评估泰它西普和贝利木单抗在诊断为系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）的成年患者中的疗效和安全性比较。我们系统检索了MEDLINE、Embase和Web of Science，时间从建库至2026年3月，以识别比较泰它西普和贝利木单抗在成年SLE患者中的回顾性观察性研究。进行荟萃分析以汇总疗效数据，报告治疗反应的比值比（OR）和95%置信区间（CI）。研究方案已在国际系统评价前瞻性注册库（PROSPERO；注册号CRD420261420984）注册。在筛选的215篇记录中，经过全文评估后，有5项研究（676例患者；340例接受泰它西普，336例接受贝利木单抗）符合纳入标准。与贝利木单抗相比，泰它西普在24周时狼疮低疾病活动状态（LLDAS）的达标率显著更高（OR = 1.87，95% CI = 1.03-3.39，p = 0.041；2项研究，I² = 0%，p = 0.92），以及24周时完全肾脏缓解率显著更高（OR = 2.38，95% CI = 1.10-5.15，p = 0.027；2项研究，I² = 0%，p = 0.88），采用固定效应模型因无异质性。24周时系统性红斑狼疮应答指数-4（SRI-4）反应（OR = 2.02，95% CI = 1.04-3.91，p = 0.038；1项研究）和52周时完全肾脏缓解率（OR = 2.67，95% CI = 1.17-6.09，p = 0.019；1项研究）在泰它西普组也显著更高。24周时泼尼松减量至≤7.5 mg/天接近统计学显著性（OR = 1.56，95% CI = 1.00-2.43，p = 0.049；1项研究）。安全性终点分析显示，两组在总体不良事件（OR = 1.21，95% CI = 0.96-1.53，p = 0.088；3项研究，I² = 0%，p = 0.95）或严重不良事件（OR = 0.68，95% CI = 0.43-1.08，p = 0.072；2项研究，I² = 0%，p = 0.89）方面无统计学显著差异。泰它西普在SLE患者中实现LLDAS、SRI-4反应、完全肾脏缓解和泼尼松剂量减少方面显示出优于贝利木单抗的疗效，而不良事件、严重不良事件或感染发生率无显著差异。

items.title: Theory of mind, empathy, and alexithymia in adolescents with systemic lupus erythematosus: associations with fatigue and internalizing symptoms.
items.abstract: This study aimed to examine theory of mind (ToM), empathy, and alexithymia in adolescents with systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) compared to typically developing controls (TDC) and to investigate the associations of these socio-emotional measures with fatigue and internalizing symptoms. In this two-center cross-sectional study, 21 adolescents with SLE (median age 16 years; 90.5% female) and 21 age- and sex-matched TDC underwent comprehensive assessment including the Faux Pas Recognition Test, Reading the Mind in the Eyes Test, Empathy and Systemizing Quotient, Alexithymia Questionnaire for Children, Revised Child Anxiety and Depression Scale, Fatigue Severity Scale, Sleep Disturbance Scale for Children, and the Wechsler Intelligence Scale for Children-IV. ToM, empathy, and systemizing scores did not differ between groups, despite a generalized trend toward lower WISC-IV performance in the SLE group and a nominally significant, exploratory deficit in Vocabulary (p = .014, r = .380). Alexithymia, particularly the difficulty identifying feelings dimension, showed strong positive correlations with fatigue and internalizing symptoms in both groups (all r ≥ .74, p < .001). Within the SLE group, an exploratory unadjusted analysis showed that longer disease duration was associated with lower empathy (r = - .592, p = .005); this finding was attenuated after adjustment for age at diagnosis. Fatigue tended to be higher in the SLE group (p = .051) without parallel differences in sleep disturbance. Externally directed social cognition did not differ from controls in stable SLE despite nominally lower vocabulary performance, although the small sample limited power to detect modest differences; internally directed emotional processing, by contrast, emerged as a transdiagnostic correlate of fatigue and internalizing symptoms. In an unadjusted exploratory within-group analysis, longer disease duration was associated with lower empathy. These findings are hypothesis-generating and require replication in larger samples with prespecified multiplicity correction. Key Points • Theory of mind and empathy did not differ from controls in adolescents with stable childhood-onset SLE. • Alexithymia strongly correlates with fatigue and internalizing symptoms in pediatric SLE. • In an unadjusted exploratory analysis, longer disease duration was associated with lower empathy.

items.titleZh: 系统性红斑狼疮青少年的心理理论、共情和述情障碍：与疲劳和内化症状的关联
items.abstractZh: 本研究旨在检查系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）青少年与典型发育对照（TDC）相比的心理理论（ToM）、共情和述情障碍，并探讨这些社会情感指标与疲劳和内化症状的关联。在这项双中心横断面研究中，21名SLE青少年（中位年龄16岁；90.5%女性）和21名年龄和性别匹配的TDC接受了全面评估，包括失礼识别测试、眼神读心测试、共情和系统化商数、儿童述情障碍问卷、修订版儿童焦虑和抑郁量表、疲劳严重度量表、儿童睡眠障碍量表和韦氏儿童智力量表第四版。两组之间的ToM、共情和系统化得分没有差异，尽管SLE组在WISC-IV表现上普遍呈较低趋势，并且在词汇方面存在名义上显著的探索性缺陷（p = .014, r = .380）。述情障碍，特别是识别感受困难维度，在两组中均与疲劳和内化症状呈强正相关（所有r ≥ .74, p < .001）。在SLE组内，一项探索性未调整分析显示，较长的病程与较低的共情相关（r = - .592, p = .005）；在调整诊断年龄后，这一发现减弱。SLE组的疲劳倾向于更高（p = .051），但睡眠障碍没有平行差异。在稳定的SLE中，外部导向的社会认知与对照组没有差异，尽管词汇表现名义上较低，但小样本限制了检测适度差异的能力；相比之下，内部导向的情绪处理作为疲劳和内化症状的跨诊断相关因素出现。在一项未调整的探索性组内分析中，较长的病程与较低的共情相关。这些发现具有假设生成性质，需要在更大样本中通过预先指定的多重性校正进行重复。关键点 • 在稳定的儿童期发病SLE青少年中，心理理论和共情与对照组没有差异。 • 述情障碍与儿童SLE中的疲劳和内化症状强相关。 • 在一项未调整的探索性分析中，较长的病程与较低的共情相关。

items.title: A machine learning approach to metabolomics identifies putative biomarker candidates and dysregulated pathways for distinguishing gout from asymptomatic hyperuricemia in the Zhuang population.
items.abstract: Gout typically develops from hyperuricemia (HUA), but the metabolic alterations driving this transition remain poorly understood, limiting our understanding of disease pathogenesis. To identify stage-specific putative biomarker candidates and to characterize dysregulated metabolic pathways distinguishing gout from HUA. We conducted a targeted metabolomics assay on the baseline plasma samples from a Zhuang minority cohort using LC-MS/MS. The analyzed sample set comprised 38 HUA patients, 47 gout patients, and 52 healthy controls. Sex-stratified differential metabolite analysis was performed across all participants, as well as in female and male subgroups. Pathway enrichment analysis was carried out using the KEGG database. Machine learning approaches, including the Boruta algorithm and support vector machine (SVM), were employed for putative biomarker discovery and model evaluation in male participants. Among all participants, 24 metabolites reached nominal significance (P < 0.05), but only uric acid remained significant after FDR correction. In sex-stratified analyses, no metabolite survived FDR correction in females, whereas in males, seven metabolites (flavone, glutamine, L-2-aminoadipic acid, L-pipecolic acid, N1-methyl-2-pyridone-5-carboxamide, phenyllactic acid, and uric acid) showed significant differences among healthy controls, HUA patients, and gout patients (FDR < 0.1). These metabolites were primarily involved in nitrogen metabolism, arginine biosynthesis, D-amino acid metabolism, nicotinate and nicotinamide metabolism, and purine metabolism. Machine learning identified four metabolites (N1-methyl-2-pyridone-5-carboxamide, flavone, glutamine, and phenyllactic acid) that distinguished gout from healthy controls, with AUCs of 0.902 and 0.800 in the training and validation sets, respectively. A second model (L-pipecolic acid, glutamine, phenyllactic acid, and flavone) discriminated gout from HUA, achieving AUCs of 0.850 and 1.000. Sensitivity analyses excluding obese or hypertriglyceridemic participants confirmed the robust performance of both models. This study suggests sex-specific metabolic alterations in gout and provides robust machine learning-based models for male participants. The identified metabolite signatures appear to extend purine metabolism to involve amino acid and energy metabolic pathways. These findings provide a basis for mechanism-targeted strategies in HUA management. External validation remains essential.

items.titleZh: 一种机器学习方法用于代谢组学识别区分壮族人群痛风与无症状高尿酸血症的推定生物标志物候选物和失调通路
items.abstractZh: 痛风通常由高尿酸血症（HUA）发展而来，但驱动这一转变的代谢改变仍知之甚少，限制了对疾病发病机制的理解。本研究旨在识别区分痛风与HUA的阶段特异性推定生物标志物候选物，并表征失调的代谢通路。我们使用LC-MS/MS对来自壮族队列的基线血浆样本进行了靶向代谢组学分析。分析的样本集包括38名HUA患者、47名痛风患者和52名健康对照。对所有参与者以及女性和男性亚组进行了性别分层的差异代谢物分析。使用KEGG数据库进行通路富集分析。采用机器学习方法，包括Boruta算法和支持向量机（SVM），用于男性参与者的推定生物标志物发现和模型评估。在所有参与者中，24种代谢物达到名义显著性（P < 0.05），但只有尿酸在FDR校正后仍显著。在性别分层分析中，女性中没有代谢物在FDR校正后存活，而在男性中，七种代谢物（黄酮、谷氨酰胺、L-2-氨基己二酸、L-哌啶酸、N1-甲基-2-吡啶酮-5-甲酰胺、苯乳酸和尿酸）在健康对照、HUA患者和痛风患者之间显示出显著差异（FDR < 0.1）。这些代谢物主要涉及氮代谢、精氨酸生物合成、D-氨基酸代谢、烟酸和烟酰胺代谢以及嘌呤代谢。机器学习识别出四种代谢物（N1-甲基-2-吡啶酮-5-甲酰胺、黄酮、谷氨酰胺和苯乳酸）可区分痛风与健康对照，训练集和验证集的AUC分别为0.902和0.800。第二个模型（L-哌啶酸、谷氨酰胺、苯乳酸和黄酮）可区分痛风与HUA，AUC分别为0.850和1.000。排除肥胖或高甘油三酯血症参与者的敏感性分析证实了两个模型的稳健性能。本研究提示痛风存在性别特异性代谢改变，并为男性参与者提供了基于机器学习的稳健模型。识别的代谢物特征似乎将嘌呤代谢扩展到涉及氨基酸和能量代谢通路。这些发现为HUA管理的机制靶向策略提供了基础。外部验证仍然必要。

items.title: Duration of Belimumab Therapy and Timing of Initiation as Predictors of Clinical Outcomes in Childhood-Onset Systemic Lupus Erythematosus: A Real-World Retrospective Study.
items.abstract: Belimumab is the only biologic approved for childhood-onset systemic lupus erythematosus (cSLE), yet evidence on the optimal timing of initiation and duration of therapy remains limited. This study aimed to evaluate the impact of belimumab treatment duration and timing of initiation on clinical outcomes in cSLE. This retrospective study included 182 patients with cSLE treated with belimumab at Beijing Children's Hospital between September 2015 and September 2025. Patients were stratified by timing of initiation (≤ 6 months vs. > 6 months from diagnosis) and treatment duration. Primary outcomes included childhood Lupus Low Disease Activity State (cLLDAS) and childhood Clinical Remission (cCR). In a subgroup of 95 patients with ≥ 2 years of follow-up, outcomes were compared by treatment duration (< 1 year, 1-2 years, ≥ 2 years) and by timing of initiation. Multivariable logistic regression was performed to identify independent predictors. Among 182 patients (81.9% female; median age 11.2 years), the median belimumab treatment duration was 14 months (IQR 7-23.8). Among 95 patients with ≥ 2 years of follow-up, cLLDAS rates increased with treatment duration: 50.0% (n = 10), 70.7% (n = 41), and 81.8% (n = 44); cCR rates were 20.0% (n = 10), 41.5% (n = 41), and 61.4% (n = 44), respectively (P = 0.101). Early initiation (≤ 6 months) was associated with significantly higher cCR rates (74.4% vs. 30.4%, P < 0.001) and lower SLEDAI-2K scores at last follow-up (0 vs. 2, P = 0.006) despite higher baseline disease activity. Multivariable logistic regression identified treatment duration as an independent predictor of cLLDAS (OR 1.17 per month, 95% CI 1.11-1.24; P < 0.001), cCR (OR 1.15, 95% CI 1.09-1.21; P < 0.001), and glucocorticoid reduction to ≤ 7.5 mg/day (OR 1.20, 95% CI 1.13-1.27; P < 0.001). Early initiation was independently associated with higher cCR rates (OR 4.31, 95% CI 1.26-14.79; P = 0.020). Longer belimumab treatment duration was associated with a higher likelihood of achieving favorable clinical outcomes in cSLE. Early initiation within 6 months of diagnosis was also associated with an increased probability of achieving clinical remission. These findings suggest that both sustained therapy and earlier initiation may contribute to improved disease control in cSLE.

items.titleZh: 贝利木单抗治疗持续时间与启动时机对儿童期发病系统性红斑狼疮临床结局的预测作用：一项真实世界回顾性研究
items.abstractZh: 贝利木单抗是唯一获批用于儿童期发病系统性红斑狼疮（cSLE）的生物制剂，但关于最佳启动时机和治疗持续时间的证据仍然有限。本研究旨在评估贝利木单抗治疗持续时间和启动时机对cSLE临床结局的影响。这项回顾性研究纳入了2015年9月至2025年9月在北京儿童医院接受贝利木单抗治疗的182例cSLE患者。根据启动时机（诊断后≤6个月 vs. >6个月）和治疗持续时间对患者进行分层。主要结局包括儿童狼疮低疾病活动状态（cLLDAS）和儿童临床缓解（cCR）。在95例随访≥2年的亚组中，比较了不同治疗持续时间（<1年、1-2年、≥2年）和启动时机的结局。采用多变量逻辑回归分析确定独立预测因素。在182例患者中（81.9%为女性；中位年龄11.2岁），贝利木单抗治疗的中位持续时间为14个月（IQR 7-23.8）。在95例随访≥2年的患者中，cLLDAS率随治疗持续时间增加而增加：50.0%（n=10）、70.7%（n=41）和81.8%（n=44）；cCR率分别为20.0%（n=10）、41.5%（n=41）和61.4%（n=44）（P=0.101）。早期启动（≤6个月）与显著更高的cCR率（74.4% vs. 30.4%，P<0.001）和末次随访时更低的SLEDAI-2K评分（0 vs. 2，P=0.006）相关，尽管基线疾病活动度更高。多变量逻辑回归分析显示，治疗持续时间是cLLDAS（OR 1.17/月，95% CI 1.11-1.24；P<0.001）、cCR（OR 1.15，95% CI 1.09-1.21；P<0.001）和糖皮质激素减量至≤7.5 mg/天（OR 1.20，95% CI 1.13-1.27；P<0.001）的独立预测因素。早期启动与更高的cCR率独立相关（OR 4.31，95% CI 1.26-14.79；P=0.020）。较长的贝利木单抗治疗持续时间与cSLE中实现良好临床结局的可能性增加相关。诊断后6个月内早期启动也与实现临床缓解的概率增加相关。这些发现提示，持续治疗和更早启动均可能有助于改善cSLE的疾病控制。

items.title: Integrating palliative care principles into systemic sclerosis management.
items.abstract: Systemic sclerosis (SSc) is a chronic multisystem autoimmune disease characterized by significant symptom burden, functional impairment, and reduced quality of life, even with advances in disease-directed therapies. This structured narrative review examines the potential role of integrating palliative care (PC) principles into multidisciplinary SSc management. A structured narrative review was conducted using literature identified in the PubMed/MEDLINE, Scopus, Web of Science, and DOAJ databases. Studies addressing supportive care, symptom management, rehabilitation, advance care planning (ACP), multidisciplinary care, and palliative-oriented interventions in SSc were reviewed and narratively synthesized. The available evidence suggests that palliative-oriented approaches may address unmet needs related to symptom burden, psychosocial distress, functional decline, and patient-centered outcomes in SSc. Interventions such as rehabilitation, hand and orofacial therapy, psychosocial support, nutritional management, pulmonary rehabilitation, and ACP, may improve quality of life and functional well-being when integrated with disease-directed treatment. However, most evidence is limited, heterogeneous, and primarily observational. The integration of PC principles into SSc management may serve as a valuable supportive strategy throughout the disease course, rather than being restricted to end-stage disease. Further prospective multidisciplinary studies are necessary to define optimal implementation strategies and patient-centered outcomes.

items.titleZh: 将姑息治疗原则整合到系统性硬化症管理中
items.abstractZh: 系统性硬化症（SSc）是一种慢性多系统自身免疫性疾病，即使在疾病导向治疗取得进展的情况下，仍以显著的症状负担、功能受损和生活质量下降为特征。这篇结构化叙述性综述探讨了将姑息治疗（PC）原则整合到多学科SSc管理中的潜在作用。使用PubMed/MEDLINE、Scopus、Web of Science和DOAJ数据库中识别的文献进行了结构化叙述性综述。回顾了涉及SSc中支持性护理、症状管理、康复、预先护理计划（ACP）、多学科护理和姑息导向干预的研究，并进行了叙述性综合。现有证据表明，姑息导向方法可能解决SSc中与症状负担、心理社会困扰、功能衰退和以患者为中心的结果相关的未满足需求。当与疾病导向治疗整合时，康复、手部和口面部治疗、心理社会支持、营养管理、肺康复和ACP等干预措施可能改善生活质量和功能健康。然而，大多数证据有限、异质性高，且主要为观察性研究。将PC原则整合到SSc管理中可能在整个病程中作为一种有价值的支持性策略，而非仅限于终末期疾病。需要进一步的前瞻性多学科研究来确定最佳实施策略和以患者为中心的结果。

items.title: Evaluation of Retinal Microvascular Changes in Juvenile Systemic Lupus Erythematosus Patients Using Optical Coherence Tomography Angiography.
items.abstract: Determination of retinal vascular perfusion and microvascular alterations in juvenile systemic lupus erythematosus (JSLE) patients with and without lupus nephropathy (LN) utilizing optical coherence tomography angiography (OCT-A). Group 1 encompassed 60 eyes of 30 JSLE patients without clinically evident lupus retinopathy, categorized into 2 groups: group 1A incorporating 30 eyes of 15 patients with LN, and group 1B incorporating 30 eyes of 15 patients without LN. Group 2 included 30 eyes of 20 healthy control subjects with corresponding age and sex characteristics. OCT-A was performed for all participants, with measurement of vascular density index in both the superficial and deep retinal capillary plexus (VDI 1 and VDI 2). Group1A showed statistically significant decrease in VDI 1 compared to groups 1B and 2 ( p = <0.0001). Furthermore, the VDI 1 was statistically significantly decreased in group 1B compared to group 2 ( p  = <0.0001). With respect to VDI 2, group 1A showed less vascular perfusion compared to groups 1B and 2 with statistical significance ( p   =  <0.0001 and 0.0048) respectively. Group 1B showed a lower VDI 2 than group 2, but with no statistical significance ( p  = 0.0598). Better retinal vascular perfusion was associated with lower grades of disease activity. Patients with JSLE, particularly those with lupus nephritis, demonstrated lower retinal vascular perfusion in the superficial and deep retinal capillary plexus compared to normative control subjects. Elevated disease activity correlated with reduced vascular density in the superficial and deep retinal capillary plexus.

items.titleZh: 利用光学相干断层扫描血管成像评估青少年系统性红斑狼疮患者视网膜微血管变化
items.abstractZh: 利用光学相干断层扫描血管成像（OCT-A）测定伴有和不伴有狼疮性肾病（LN）的青少年系统性红斑狼疮（JSLE）患者的视网膜血管灌注和微血管改变。第1组包括30例无临床明显狼疮视网膜病变的JSLE患者的60只眼，分为2个亚组：1A组包括15例伴有LN的患者的30只眼，1B组包括15例不伴LN的患者的30只眼。第2组包括20名年龄和性别匹配的健康对照者的30只眼。对所有参与者进行OCT-A检查，测量浅层和深层视网膜毛细血管丛的血管密度指数（VDI 1和VDI 2）。与1B组和2组相比，1A组的VDI 1显著降低（p < 0.0001）。此外，与2组相比，1B组的VDI 1也显著降低（p < 0.0001）。在VDI 2方面，1A组的血管灌注低于1B组和2组，差异具有统计学意义（p分别< 0.0001和0.0048）。1B组的VDI 2低于2组，但无统计学意义（p = 0.0598）。较好的视网膜血管灌注与较低等级的疾病活动度相关。与正常对照者相比，JSLE患者，特别是伴有狼疮性肾炎的患者，其浅层和深层视网膜毛细血管丛的视网膜血管灌注较低。较高的疾病活动度与浅层和深层视网膜毛细血管丛的血管密度降低相关。

items.title: Disparities in severe infection risk associated with systemic lupus erythematosus: evidence from a causal forest analysis.
items.abstract: Severe infections are a primary cause of morbidity and premature mortality in patients with Systemic Lupus Erythematosus (SLE). Although SLE patients are known to have an elevated average risk of severe infection, little is known about how this excess risk varies by patient characteristics. Population-average estimates may mask important clinical heterogeneity. Identifying factors that place certain patients at disproportionately higher risk is essential for personalized risk assessment. The aim of this study was to quantify the heterogeneity in the excess severe infection rate due to SLE and to identify the key patient-level clinical and demographic risk modifiers that drive this heterogeneity. We conducted a population-based matched cohort study using health administrative data from British Columbia, Canada (1990-2024). We identified 10,517 incident SLE patients using a validated algorithm and matched them 1:5 to 52,585 non-SLE controls based on birth year, sex, and index year. To measure the heterogeneity of infection risk, we employed Causal Forests to estimate personalized excess infection risk for each SLE patient. Generalized Additive Models (GAMs) were used to characterize the potentially non-linear relationships between patient profiles and the estimated excess risk of severe infection.All inferences, opinions, and conclusions drawn in this research are those of the authors, and do not reflect the opinions or policies of the Data Steward(s). No personal identifying information was made available as part of this study. Procedures used were in compliance with British Columbia's Freedom of Information and Privacy Protection Act. Ethical approval was obtained from the University of British Columbia's Behavioral Research Ethics Board (H15-00887). Using causal forests, the estimated individual-level excess risk of severe infection among SLE patients averaged 21.12 per 1,000 person-years (SE = 3.14), with substantial variation across individuals (SD = 19.73 per 1,000 person-years). Variable importance analyses highlight baseline number of outpatient visits, number of hospitalizations, Charlson comorbidity index, age, rural residence, hypertension, and income as key effect modifiers. GAMs analyses reveal higher excess risk is associated with prior infection, rural residence, hypertension, cardiovascular medication, congestive heart failure, glucocorticoid use and depression. Higher income and oral contraceptive pill/hormone replacement therapy are associated with lower excess infection risk. Significant disparities exist in the excess infection risk associated with SLE. Focusing only on population-average risk can obscure vulnerable subgroups with disproportionately high infection rates. Modern causal machine learning methods can support personalized risk stratification, helping clinicians move beyond average risk estimates toward targeted surveillance and prevention for high-risk SLE patients.

items.titleZh: 系统性红斑狼疮相关严重感染风险中的差异：来自因果森林分析的证据
items.abstractZh: 严重感染是系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）患者发病和过早死亡的主要原因。尽管已知SLE患者的严重感染平均风险升高，但关于这种超额风险如何随患者特征变化而不同，我们知之甚少。人群平均估计可能掩盖重要的临床异质性。识别使某些患者面临不成比例高风险的因素对于个性化风险评估至关重要。本研究旨在量化SLE导致的严重感染超额率的异质性，并确定驱动这种异质性的关键患者层面临床和人口统计学风险调节因素。我们使用加拿大不列颠哥伦比亚省的健康管理数据（1990-2024年）进行了一项基于人群的匹配队列研究。我们使用经过验证的算法识别了10,517例新发SLE患者，并根据出生年份、性别和索引年份将其与52,585例非SLE对照进行1:5匹配。为了测量感染风险的异质性，我们采用因果森林估计每位SLE患者的个性化超额感染风险。使用广义加性模型（GAMs）描述患者特征与估计的严重感染超额风险之间潜在的非线性关系。本研究中的所有推论、观点和结论均为作者本人观点，不代表数据管理员的意见或政策。本研究未提供任何个人身份信息。所采用的程序符合不列颠哥伦比亚省的《信息自由与隐私保护法》。伦理批准来自不列颠哥伦比亚大学行为研究伦理委员会（H15-00887）。使用因果森林，SLE患者中估计的个体水平严重感染超额风险平均为每1000人年21.12（SE = 3.14），个体间差异显著（SD = 每1000人年19.73）。变量重要性分析突出显示基线门诊就诊次数、住院次数、查尔森合并症指数、年龄、农村居住地、高血压和收入是关键效应调节因素。GAMs分析显示，较高的超额风险与既往感染、农村居住地、高血压、心血管药物、充血性心力衰竭、糖皮质激素使用和抑郁相关。较高的收入和口服避孕药/激素替代治疗与较低的超额感染风险相关。SLE相关的超额感染风险存在显著差异。仅关注人群平均风险可能会掩盖感染率不成比例高的脆弱亚组。现代因果机器学习方法可以支持个性化风险分层，帮助临床医生超越平均风险估计，对高风险SLE患者进行有针对性的监测和预防。

items.title: Rapidly Progressive Myocarditis and Cardiogenic Shock: The Failing Heart in Systemic Sclerosis.
items.abstract: Cardiac involvement in systemic sclerosis (SSc) is under-recognized and may present as fulminant myocarditis with cardiogenic shock and poor outcomes. A 49-year-old woman with diffuse SSc presented with progressive dyspnea and hypotension. Laboratory testing showed markedly elevated cardiac biomarkers, and echocardiography demonstrated severe biventricular systolic dysfunction. Electrocardiography revealed sinus tachycardia with right bundle branch block. Cardiac magnetic resonance showed diffuse biventricular myocardial inflammation, confirmed by endomyocardial biopsy demonstrating lymphocytic infiltration. Despite inotropes, diuretic agents, and dual mechanical circulatory support with venoarterial extracorporeal membrane oxygenation and an Impella CP device, myocardial recovery did not occur. High-dose immunosuppression was delayed, and heart transplantation was deferred because of cavitary lung lesions. The patient developed progressive multiorgan failure and died in the sixth week of hospitalization. Fulminant SSc-myocarditis carries a grave prognosis and requires early recognition and co-ordinated multidisciplinary care.

items.titleZh: 系统性硬化症中的快速进展性心肌炎和心源性休克：衰竭的心脏。
items.abstractZh: 系统性硬化症（SSc）的心脏受累常被低估，可能表现为暴发性心肌炎伴心源性休克，预后不良。一名49岁女性弥漫性SSc患者出现进行性呼吸困难和低血压。实验室检查显示心脏生物标志物显著升高，超声心动图显示严重双心室收缩功能障碍。心电图显示窦性心动过速伴右束支传导阻滞。心脏磁共振显示弥漫性双心室心肌炎症，经心内膜心肌活检证实为淋巴细胞浸润。尽管使用了正性肌力药物、利尿剂以及静脉-动脉体外膜肺氧合和Impella CP装置的双重机械循环支持，心肌功能仍未恢复。大剂量免疫抑制治疗被延迟，因肺部空洞性病变而推迟了心脏移植。患者出现进行性多器官衰竭，于住院第六周死亡。暴发性SSc相关性心肌炎预后极差，需要早期识别和协调的多学科护理。

items.title: Methylation and polygenic risk scores capture different features of systemic lupus erythematosus.
items.abstract: The aetiopathogenesis of SLE encompasses genetic, environmental and epigenetic factors. We investigated associations between an SLE methylation risk score (MRS), HLA-DRB1*03:01, a non-HLA polygenic risk score (PRS) and clinical and immunological phenotypes. DNA methylation in whole blood from patients fulfilling ≥4 ACR-82 criteria and controls were investigated using the Illumina HM450K array. The discovery cohort included 311 patients and 400 controls, and the replication cohort comprised 175 patients and 187 controls. Seventeen independent, top differentially methylated CpG sites (Δβ of ≥ 0.1) from case-control comparisons, were used to calculate the MRS. Genotyping was performed using the Immunochip, and the PRS included 57 non-HLA SLE SNVs. Clinical data were collected from patient charts, and serum IFN-α2 was measured using Simoa. Higher MRS was strongly associated with serum IFN-α2 levels (p = 1.04 × 10-14). In both cohorts, higher MRS associated with discoid lupus, immunologic involvement, and anti-SSA/SSB/RNP/Sm autoantibodies (all p < 0.05), and with higher disease activity in the discovery cohort (p = 1.50 × 10-4). MRS was also elevated in patients with multiple autoantibodies (p < 1.0 × 10-15) and in HLA-DRB1*03:01 carriers (p < 1.0 × 10-3). In contrast, higher PRS was associated with nephritis, anti-dsDNA positivity, and lower prevalence of anti-SSB antibodies (all p < 0.05). No correlation was observed between the MRS and the PRS (p = 0.35). The MRS defines an interferon-high, HLA-DRB1*03:01-linked SLE subset with multiple autoantibodies, partly distinct from PRS-associated nephritis risk, highlighting potentially divergent pathogenic pathways. These findings underscore the value of integrating genetic and epigenetic data to better understand underlying disease mechanisms in SLE.

items.title: Trends in heart failure mortality among patients with rheumatoid arthritis in the United States (1999-2020): A nationwide cross-sectional analysis of the CDC WONDER database.
items.abstract: Rheumatoid Arthritis (RA) is a known risk factor for heart failure (HF) due to its chronic autoimmune-mediated inflammation. However, data on trends of Rheumatoid arthritis associated HF mortality in the United States (U.S.) remain limited. This study comprehensively explores the trends in rheumatoid arthritis associated mortality attributable to HF patients in the United States. A retrospective analysis was performed using data from the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention Wide-Ranged Online Data for Epidemiologic Research database. We obtained age-adjusted mortality rates (AAMR) per 100,000 population and used Joinpoint regression to calculate the annual percentage change. The results were analyzed by year, sex, race, and geographic region to identify patterns in mortality from RA-associated HF. Between 1999 and 2020, 28,750 cases of cardiac failure in RA patients aged 55 and older were documented. In 1999, the AAMR was 2.5; by 2020, it was 1.9 (annual percentage change: -4.05 [95% CI; -6.30 to -3.13]). Sex differences did not go away, either, with women continuously having a higher AAMR (2.3) than men (1.2). The highest AAMR was 2.0 for non-Hispanic White, 1.5 for NH Black or African American, and 1.3 for Hispanic or Latino. Geographically, the Northeast had the lowest AAMR (1.4), while the Midwestern region had the highest (2.3). Nonmetropolitan areas had a greater AAMR (2.6) than metropolitan areas (1.7). Interestingly, Vermont, Oregon, Minnesota, Montana, South Dakota, and North Dakota had the highest AAMRs. Between 1999 and 2020, RA-associated HF mortality declined overall but rose again after 2018, particularly among women, non-Hispanic Whites, and residents of rural Midwestern states. Persistent disparities by sex, race, and geography highlight the need for targeted cardiovascular and rheumatologic care strategies.

items.title: Discovery of an oral, potent and highly selective immunoproteasome inhibitor for the treatment of rheumatoid arthritis and ulcerative colitis.
items.abstract: The immunoproteasome plays a critical role in enhancing antigen presentation, regulating inflammatory responses and modulating T-cell differentiation. Its overexpression can lead to abnormal generation of self-antigen peptides and promote their presentation on MHC class I molecules, thereby breaking immune tolerance, activating CD8 + T cells and driving autoimmune pathological processes. Therefore, as a promising therapeutic target for autoimmune diseases, a variety of immunoproteasome inhibitors have been developed. However, these inhibitors have limitations in terms of selectivity and oral bioavailability, which restricts their development in clinical applications. To address these, we designed a series of novel compounds and then screened compound ent-F10, which is an orally active immunoproteasome inhibitor. Compound ent-F10 exhibits potent and highly selective inhibition against the β5i subunit (IC 50 : 0.08 μM), with a β5/β5i selectivity ratio of 123.8. In the mouse ulcerative colitis model, ent-F10 demonstrates favorable oral in vivo pharmacodynamics. Furthermore, ent-F10 also showed dose-dependent oral efficacy in a rat rheumatoid arthritis model. Moreover, ent-F10 exhibits lower inhibitory activity against hERG, reducing the potential risk of cardiac toxicity, which further demonstrates its safety. Collectively, ent-F10 can be developed as a potent, selective and orally available drug candidate.

items.titleZh: 发现一种口服、强效且高选择性的免疫蛋白酶体抑制剂用于治疗类风湿性关节炎和溃疡性结肠炎
items.abstractZh: 免疫蛋白酶体在增强抗原呈递、调节炎症反应和调控T细胞分化中发挥关键作用。其过度表达可导致自身抗原肽的异常生成，并促进其在MHC I类分子上的呈递，从而破坏免疫耐受、激活CD8+ T细胞并驱动自身免疫病理过程。因此，作为自身免疫性疾病的有前景治疗靶点，已开发出多种免疫蛋白酶体抑制剂。然而，这些抑制剂在选择性和口服生物利用度方面存在局限性，限制了其在临床应用中的发展。为解决这些问题，我们设计了一系列新型化合物，并筛选出化合物ent-F10，这是一种口服活性的免疫蛋白酶体抑制剂。化合物ent-F10对β5i亚基表现出强效且高选择性的抑制（IC50：0.08 μM），β5/β5i选择性比为123.8。在小鼠溃疡性结肠炎模型中，ent-F10显示出良好的口服体内药效学特性。此外，ent-F10在大鼠类风湿性关节炎模型中也表现出剂量依赖性的口服疗效。而且，ent-F10对hERG的抑制活性较低，降低了心脏毒性的潜在风险，进一步证明了其安全性。总之，ent-F10可被开发为一种强效、选择性和口服可用的候选药物。

items.title: Comparative safety of JAK inhibitors versus TNF inhibitors in psoriatic arthritis: a real-world propensity score-matched cohort study.
items.abstract: Janus kinase inhibitors (JAKi) and tumor necrosis factor inhibitors (TNFi) demonstrate therapeutic efficacy in psoriatic arthritis (PsA), yet comparative real-world safety data remain limited. This study quantified adverse outcome risks between JAKi and TNFi in PsA patients. Retrospective cohort study utilized the TriNetX Global Collaborative Network electronic health records. Adults aged 18-99 years with PsA initiating JAKi or TNFi without prior exposure to the alternative class were identified. Cohorts underwent rigorous 1:1 propensity score matching on 42 baseline covariates, including inflammatory markers and indication-bias proxies. Incident adverse outcomes at 1-1825 days after treatment initiation were assessed using Kaplan-Meier analysis and absolute risk calculations. Post-matching analysis included 2723 patients per cohort. Over a 5-year follow-up, JAKi initiation was associated with increased all-cause mortality [96 vs. 63 events; hazard ratio (HR) 2.012, 95% confidence interval 1.462-2.771, P = 0.048], herpes zoster (HR 1.888, P < 0.001), pneumonia (HR 1.380, P = 0.011), and sepsis (HR 1.421, P = 0.045). TNFi use demonstrated an increased risk of skin and soft tissue infections compared with JAKi (189 vs. 147 events; risk difference -0.017, P = 0.016). Rigorous adjustment eliminated a previously suspected signal for osteomyelitis. No significant differences were observed for major adverse cardiovascular events or venous thromboembolism. JAKi and TNFi exhibit distinct safety profiles in PsA. JAKi were associated with higher risks of mortality and severe or viral infections, whereas TNFi carried a higher skin and soft tissue infection risk. These findings emphasize the need for rigorous methodological adjustment in observational data and support individualized shared decision-making.

items.titleZh: JAK抑制剂与TNF抑制剂在银屑病关节炎中的安全性比较：一项基于真实世界的倾向评分匹配队列研究
items.abstractZh: Janus激酶抑制剂（JAKi）和肿瘤坏死因子抑制剂（TNFi）在银屑病关节炎（PsA）中显示出治疗疗效，但比较性的真实世界安全性数据仍然有限。本研究量化了PsA患者中JAKi与TNFi之间不良结局的风险。回顾性队列研究利用了TriNetX全球协作网络的电子健康记录。纳入年龄18-99岁、开始使用JAKi或TNFi且既往未暴露于另一类药物的PsA成人患者。队列在42个基线协变量（包括炎症标志物和适应症偏倚代理变量）上进行严格的1:1倾向评分匹配。在治疗开始后1-1825天内，使用Kaplan-Meier分析和绝对风险计算评估不良结局事件。匹配后分析包括每组2723名患者。在5年随访期间，JAKi启动与全因死亡率增加相关[96 vs. 63事件；风险比（HR）2.012，95%置信区间1.462-2.771，P=0.048]、带状疱疹（HR 1.888，P<0.001）、肺炎（HR 1.380，P=0.011）和脓毒症（HR 1.421，P=0.045）。与JAKi相比，TNFi使用显示皮肤和软组织感染风险增加（189 vs. 147事件；风险差-0.017，P=0.016）。严格调整消除了先前怀疑的骨髓炎信号。主要不良心血管事件或静脉血栓栓塞未见显著差异。JAKi和TNFi在PsA中表现出不同的安全性特征。JAKi与较高的死亡率和严重或病毒感染风险相关，而TNFi携带较高的皮肤和软组织感染风险。这些发现强调了在观察性数据中进行严格方法学调整的必要性，并支持个体化的共同决策。

items.title: Unilateral High-Riding Vertebral Artery Associates With the Progression of Atlantoaxial Joint Degeneration in Patients With Rheumatoid Arthritis.
items.abstract: High-riding vertebral artery (HRVA) at C2 is more prevalent in patients with rheumatoid arthritis (RA) than in the general population, but its clinical significance remains unclear. Recent evidence in non-RA individuals suggests that unilateral HRVA may contribute to atlantoaxial joint degeneration (AAJD) through asymmetric mechanical stress. This study investigated whether unilateral HRVA is similarly associated with the progression of AAJD in RA. We retrospectively analyzed 336 RA patients from the single institutional cohort who underwent CT scans, including C1-C2, between 2011 and 2024. HRVA was defined as a C2 internal height < 2 mm and/or isthmus height < 5 mm. Morphological parameters (C1 lateral mass height, C1/2 coronal inclination, and C1/2 relative rotation angle) and AAJD grades were evaluated. Logistic regression was used to identify factors associated with moderate-to-severe AAJD (grade ≥ 2). HRVA was observed in 147 patients (116 unilateral). Compared with patients without HRVA, those with unilateral HRVA had longer RA duration (17.5 vs. 12.9 years, p < 0.01) and higher ACPA positivity (78.8% vs. 66.9%, p < 0.05), but no differences in disease activity or medication use. Moderate-to-severe AAJD was significantly more frequent in the unilateral HRVA group (62.9% vs. 42.3%, p < 0.001). Multivariate analysis identified older age, longer RA duration, and unilateral HRVA as independent risk factors for AAJD. These findings indicate that unilateral HRVA is independently associated with atlantoaxial facet joint degeneration in patients with RA in addition to aging and disease duration, suggesting a role of asymmetric mechanical loading in cervical joint pathology.

items.titleZh: 单侧高位椎动脉与类风湿关节炎患者寰枢关节退变进展的相关性
items.abstractZh: 高位椎动脉（HRVA）在C2水平在类风湿关节炎（RA）患者中的发生率高于普通人群，但其临床意义尚不明确。近期在非RA个体中的证据表明，单侧HRVA可能通过不对称机械应力导致寰枢关节退变（AAJD）。本研究探讨了单侧HRVA是否与RA患者AAJD的进展相关。我们回顾性分析了2011年至2024年间来自单一机构队列的336例RA患者，这些患者均接受了包括C1-C2的CT扫描。HRVA定义为C2内部高度<2 mm和/或峡部高度<5 mm。评估了形态学参数（C1侧块高度、C1/2冠状面倾斜角和C1/2相对旋转角）及AAJD分级。采用Logistic回归分析确定与中重度AAJD（分级≥2）相关的因素。147例患者观察到HRVA（116例为单侧）。与无HRVA的患者相比，单侧HRVA患者的RA病程更长（17.5年 vs. 12.9年，p<0.01），ACPA阳性率更高（78.8% vs. 66.9%，p<0.05），但疾病活动度或药物使用无差异。单侧HRVA组中重度AAJD的发生率显著更高（62.9% vs. 42.3%，p<0.001）。多变量分析确定年龄较大、RA病程较长和单侧HRVA是AAJD的独立危险因素。这些发现表明，除年龄和病程外，单侧HRVA与RA患者寰枢关节面退变独立相关，提示不对称机械负荷在颈椎关节病理中发挥作用。

items.title: Thrombotic Antiphospholipid Syndrome: A Long Term Follow-up of Patients With Recurrent Pregnancy Loss and Antiphospholipid Antibodies From the APS 1994 Study.
items.abstract: There is a paucity of studies on the incidence and predictors of thrombotic antiphospholipid syndrome (APS) after pregnancy in patients with recurrent pregnancy loss (RPL) and antiphospholipid antibodies (aPL). This prospective study aimed to assess the long-term prognosis, including the occurrence of thrombosis and associated risk factors, in patients with aPL-positive RPL and related obstetric APS manifestations. We examined patients with RPL and related obstetric APS manifestations who were positive for lupus anticoagulant (LA) based on APTT, Russell's viper venom time (RVVT), or β2glycoprotein I-dependent anticardiolipin antibody (β2GPIaCL) IgG and visited Nagoya City University Hospital from 1994 to 2019. A survey was conducted in 2024 in which patients were asked to complete a questionnaire on the development of APS manifestations based on the American College of Rheumatology/European Alliance of Associations for Rheumatology classification criteria. Data of 259 of 285 patients (90.5%) who responded to the questionnaire were analysed. The median follows-up duration was 17 (4.6-31.1) years. Cumulatively, 9.6% (25/259) of patients with aPLs and 15.7% (18/114) of those with obstetric APS experienced thrombotic APS. LA-APTT, LA-RVVT, and　β2GPIaCL IgG were independent predictors of thrombotic APS, with area under the curve values of 0.85 (0.73-0.97), 0.93 (0.87-0.99), and 0.80 (0.68-0.93), respectively. A history of intrauterine foetal death, early-onset preeclampsia, no live birth, thrombosis and complications of systematic lupus erythematosus, and persistent aPL were predictive of thrombotic APS. Patients with RPL and aPL who exhibit the identified risk factors should undergo subsequent follow-up after pregnancy. Further research is required to investigate the potential for thrombosis prevention.

items.titleZh: 血栓性抗磷脂综合征：APS 1994 研究中复发性妊娠丢失和抗磷脂抗体患者的长期随访
items.abstractZh: 关于复发性妊娠丢失（RPL）和抗磷脂抗体（aPL）患者在妊娠后发生血栓性抗磷脂综合征（APS）的发生率和预测因素的研究较少。本前瞻性研究旨在评估aPL阳性RPL及相关产科APS表现患者的长期预后，包括血栓形成及其相关危险因素的发生。我们检查了1994年至2019年在名古屋市立大学医院就诊的、基于APTT、Russell蝰蛇毒时间（RVVT）或β2糖蛋白I依赖性抗心磷脂抗体（β2GPIaCL）IgG阳性狼疮抗凝物（LA）的RPL及相关产科APS表现患者。2024年进行了一项调查，要求患者根据美国风湿病学会/欧洲风湿病协会联盟分类标准填写关于APS表现发展的问卷。分析了259/285名（90.5%）回复问卷的患者数据。中位随访时间为17（4.6-31.1）年。累积而言，9.6%（25/259）的aPL患者和15.7%（18/114）的产科APS患者发生了血栓性APS。LA-APTT、LA-RVVT和β2GPIaCL IgG是血栓性APS的独立预测因子，曲线下面积值分别为0.85（0.73-0.97）、0.93（0.87-0.99）和0.80（0.68-0.93）。宫内胎儿死亡史、早发性子痫前期、无活产、血栓形成和系统性红斑狼疮并发症以及持续性aPL可预测血栓性APS。具有已识别危险因素的RPL和aPL患者应在妊娠后进行后续随访。需要进一步研究以探讨血栓预防的可能性。

items.title: Redefining Uric Acid and Cardiovascular Risk: Vascular Gout and Crystal-Driven Vascular Inflammation in Asymptomatic Hyperuricemia.
items.abstract: Urate-lowering trials have not consistently demonstrated benefits in preventing coronary events, revealing an interventional gap and challenging the causal role of uric acid in cardiovascular disease. Advances in dual-energy computed tomography have revealed monosodium urate crystal deposition within vessel walls and atherosclerotic plaques, leading to the concept of vascular gout. Persistent hyperuricemia, particularly in Asian populations characterized by urate underexcretion, may facilitate crystal deposition and innate immune pathway activation. These inflammatory processes may promote vascular inflammation, plaque instability, and cardiovascular events. Xanthine oxidase inhibition effectively lowers serum uric acid levels and reduces monosodium urate crystal burden in articular tissues. However, whether urate-lowering therapy reduces monosodium urate crystal deposition and crystal-driven inflammation within the vascular wall remains unknown. Therefore, we aimed to reframe uric acid from a metabolic marker to a mediator of urate crystal-driven vascular inflammation and discuss future therapeutic strategies targeting crystal burden and inflammation in Asian populations.

items.titleZh: 重新定义尿酸与心血管风险：无症状高尿酸血症中的血管痛风与晶体驱动的血管炎症
items.abstractZh: 降尿酸试验并未一致显示在预防冠状动脉事件方面的益处，这揭示了一个干预缺口，并对尿酸在心血管疾病中的因果作用提出了挑战。双能计算机断层扫描的进展揭示了血管壁和动脉粥样硬化斑块内单钠尿酸盐晶体的沉积，从而提出了血管痛风的概念。持续性高尿酸血症，特别是在以尿酸排泄不足为特征的亚洲人群中，可能促进晶体沉积和先天免疫通路的激活。这些炎症过程可能促进血管炎症、斑块不稳定和心血管事件。黄嘌呤氧化酶抑制可有效降低血清尿酸水平并减少关节组织中的单钠尿酸盐晶体负荷。然而，降尿酸治疗是否能减少血管壁内的单钠尿酸盐晶体沉积和晶体驱动的炎症仍不清楚。因此，我们旨在将尿酸从代谢标志物重新定义为尿酸盐晶体驱动的血管炎症的介质，并讨论针对亚洲人群晶体负荷和炎症的未来治疗策略。

items.title: Circumferential minimally invasive reconstruction for lumbar destructive deformity secondary to spinal gout: a case report.
items.abstract: Spinal involvement constitutes an uncommon manifestation of gout, and destructive deformity as a consequence of spinal gout is rare. A case is presented involving a 59-year-old man diagnosed with spinal gout, which led to a destructive deformity in the lumbar region. The condition was addressed through a two-stage circumferential reconstruction procedure, including oblique lumbar interbody fusion first, followed by endoscopic decompression utilization unilateral biportal endoscopy technology and transpedicular instrumentation fixation. After surgery, the patient got normal ambulation with successful fusion at the involved segment. This report highlights the surgical strategy for addressing spinal deformity associated with gout, while also advocating for appropriate treatment strategy tailored to this rare condition.

items.titleZh: 环形微创重建治疗脊柱痛风继发腰椎破坏性畸形：一例报告
items.abstractZh: 脊柱受累是痛风的一种罕见表现，而由脊柱痛风导致的破坏性畸形更为罕见。本文报告一例59岁男性患者，诊断为脊柱痛风，导致腰椎区域出现破坏性畸形。通过两阶段环形重建手术进行治疗，首先进行斜外侧腰椎椎间融合术，随后采用单侧双通道内镜技术进行内镜下减压及经椎弓根内固定术。术后患者恢复正常行走能力，受累节段实现成功融合。本报告强调了针对痛风相关脊柱畸形的手术策略，同时提倡针对这一罕见疾病制定合适的治疗方案。

items.title: Oral health status and subgingival microbiota in children with juvenile idiopathic arthritis.
items.abstract: This study aimed to compare the oral and dental health status and the oral microbiota of patients with juvenile idiopathic arthritis (JIA) with those of healthy children. The 60 patients with JIA and 26 healthy children were included in the study. Decayed, missing, filled teeth index (DMFT/dmft), oral hygiene index (OHI), gingival index (GI), and papillary bleeding (PB) index analyses were performed for the permanent and deciduous teeth of the patients in the pediatric dental clinic. Subgingival plaque samples were taken from the gingival groove and tooth surface with a sterile swab and stored in a -80C freezer. Following the DNA isolation, the analysis of microbiota content was performed by 16S rRNA gene sequencing method. The oral hygiene index (p=0.045), debris index (p=0.000), gingival index (p=0.001), and papillary bleeding index (p=0.002) were significantly higher in the patient group than in the control group. Oral microbiome analysis found no significant difference in alpha and beta diversity between the groups. Porphyromonas and Peptostreptococcus (Peptostreptococcales-Tissierellales) were more common in JIA, while the presence of Atopobium , Scardovia , Rothia , and Propionivibrio were higher in the control group. In our study, The oral hygiene index (OHI) value, debris index (DI), and PBI were significantly higher in the patient group compared to the control group. Some bacteria such as Porphyromonas and Peptostreptococcus were more common in the JIA group, compared to the control group. This study shows that the oral health and oral microbiota populations of children with JIA may be altered compared to healthy children. These changes may create a predisposition to local inflammatory processes and potentially contribute to the onset and severity of the disease.

items.titleZh: 幼年特发性关节炎儿童的口腔健康状况和龈下微生物群
items.abstractZh: 本研究旨在比较幼年特发性关节炎（JIA）患者与健康儿童的口腔和牙齿健康状况及口腔微生物群。研究纳入60名JIA患者和26名健康儿童。在儿科牙科诊所对患者的恒牙和乳牙进行了龋失补指数（DMFT/dmft）、口腔卫生指数（OHI）、牙龈指数（GI）和乳头出血（PB）指数分析。使用无菌拭子从牙龈沟和牙齿表面采集龈下菌斑样本，并保存在-80°C冰箱中。DNA分离后，通过16S rRNA基因测序方法进行微生物群含量分析。患者组的口腔卫生指数（p=0.045）、软垢指数（p=0.000）、牙龈指数（p=0.001）和乳头出血指数（p=0.002）显著高于对照组。口腔微生物组分析发现两组间的α和β多样性无显著差异。JIA组中卟啉单胞菌属和消化链球菌属（Peptostreptococcales-Tissierellales）更常见，而对照组中阿托波菌属、Scardovia、罗氏菌属和Propionivibrio的丰度更高。本研究中，患者组的口腔卫生指数（OHI）值、软垢指数（DI）和PBI显著高于对照组。与对照组相比，JIA组中某些细菌如卟啉单胞菌属和消化链球菌属更常见。本研究表明，与健康儿童相比，JIA儿童的口腔健康和口腔微生物群可能发生改变。这些改变可能造成局部炎症过程的易感性，并可能促进疾病的发生和严重程度。

items.title: Clinical significance of radiological usual interstitial pneumonia pattern in primary Sjögren syndrome-associated interstitial lung disease.
items.abstract: The radiological usual interstitial pneumonia (UIP) pattern demonstrates heterogeneity across different underlying etiologies. This study aimed to characterize its clinical and prognostic impact in primary Sjögren's syndrome-associated interstitial lung disease (pSS-ILD) and compare these features with those in idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis (IPF). Consecutive patients with pSS-ILD and IPF were enrolled. Clinical characteristics were compared between pSS-ILD patients with (UIP-pSS) and without (non-UIP-pSS) radiological UIP, as well as between UIP-pSS and IPF patients. Risk factors for UIP pattern were identified by logistic regression. Survival was compared using log-rank test. In total, 558 pSS-ILD patients and 199 IPF patients were included. Radiological UIP pattern was identified in 18.8% of the pSS-ILD cohort. Compared to non-UIP-pSS patients, UIP-pSS patients were older, comprised more male patients and smokers (all p<0.05), and showed a greater prevalence of pulmonary hypertension (37.1% vs 20.5%, p=0.003). They also exhibited lower lung diffusing capacity for carbon monoxide (DLco) % predicted (p=0.043), increased composite physiologic index (CPI; p=0.016), and higher Gender-Age-Physiology (GAP) index (p=0.002). Also, UIP-pSS patients had increased 1-year (16.2% vs 6.8%, p=0.002), 3-year (34.4% vs 17.7%, p=0.001), and 5-year mortality (55.7% vs 35.0%, p=0.002). When compared to IPF controls, UIP-pSS patients demonstrated higher DLco % predicted (p<0.001), lower CPI (p=0.009) and GAP index (p<0.001), and longer median survival (66.0 vs 40.0 months, p<0.001). The radiological UIP pattern correlated with impaired pulmonary function and increased mortality in pSS-ILD. However, compared to IPF patients, individuals with UIP-pSS exhibited better pulmonary function and prognosis.

items.titleZh: 放射学寻常型间质性肺炎模式在原发性干燥综合征相关间质性肺疾病中的临床意义
items.abstractZh: 放射学寻常型间质性肺炎（UIP）模式在不同基础病因中表现出异质性。本研究旨在描述其在原发性干燥综合征相关间质性肺疾病（pSS-ILD）中的临床和预后影响，并将这些特征与特发性肺纤维化（IPF）进行比较。连续纳入pSS-ILD和IPF患者。比较有放射学UIP（UIP-pSS）和无放射学UIP（非UIP-pSS）的pSS-ILD患者之间，以及UIP-pSS与IPF患者之间的临床特征。通过逻辑回归确定UIP模式的风险因素。使用对数秩检验比较生存率。共纳入558例pSS-ILD患者和199例IPF患者。在pSS-ILD队列中，18.8%的患者存在放射学UIP模式。与非UIP-pSS患者相比，UIP-pSS患者年龄更大，男性患者和吸烟者更多（均p<0.05），且肺动脉高压患病率更高（37.1% vs 20.5%，p=0.003）。他们还表现出较低的肺一氧化碳弥散量（DLco）%预计值（p=0.043）、较高的复合生理指数（CPI；p=0.016）和较高的性别-年龄-生理（GAP）指数（p=0.002）。此外，UIP-pSS患者的1年（16.2% vs 6.8%，p=0.002）、3年（34.4% vs 17.7%，p=0.001）和5年死亡率（55.7% vs 35.0%，p=0.002）均增加。与IPF对照组相比，UIP-pSS患者表现出更高的DLco%预计值（p<0.001）、更低的CPI（p=0.009）和GAP指数（p<0.001），以及更长的中位生存期（66.0 vs 40.0个月，p<0.001）。放射学UIP模式与pSS-ILD中肺功能受损和死亡率增加相关。然而，与IPF患者相比，UIP-pSS患者表现出更好的肺功能和预后。

items.title: The associations between nailfold microvascular abnormalities and systemic inflammation or Th17/Treg dysregulation in rheumatoid arthritis.
items.abstract: To investigate the abnormal characteristics of nailfold microcirculation (NMC) in patients with rheumatoid arthritis (RA) and to further analyze the associations between these abnormalities and common systemic inflammatory indicators or the key immunoregulatory cell subpopulation Th17/Treg cells. This cross-sectional observation study enrolled 120 RA patients as the RA group and 60 gender- and age-matched healthy individuals as the healthy control (HC) group. A NMC microscope was used to assess the NMC status and clinical data were collected. Spearman correlation was used to evaluate the relationships between NMC abnormalities and inflammatory or immunological indicators. Lasso regression and random forest model were used to screen key predictors. Receiver operating characteristic (ROC) curves were used to assess the diagnostic efficacy of the Th17/Treg ratio for moderate-to-severe NMC abnormalities, and the goodness-of-fit and clinical utility were validated using the Hosmer-Lemeshow test, calibration curves, and decision curve analysis (DCA). Bootstrap method was used for internal validation. Compared to the HC group, the RA group possessed higher number of crossed capillary loops, morphology score, flow pattern score, perivascular score, and total NMC score but lower flow velocity. Spearman correlation analysis demonstrated that the total NMC score was positively correlated with the platelet-to-lymphocyte ratio (PLR) ( p  = 0.028), platelet-to-red blood cell ratio (PAR) ( p  = 0.037), systemic immune-inflammation index (SII) ( p  = 0.009), and interleukin-2R (IL-2R) ( p  = 0.046). A total NMC score >4 was defined as moderate-to-severe NMC abnormality. Lasso regression and random forest model identified Th17/Treg ratio was the only independent associated factor for this subgroup and the area under the curve (AUC) was 0.708. The Hosmer-Lemeshow test and calibration curve confirmed favorable goodness-of-fit, and the DCA curve confirmed considerable clinical benefit of this model. The mean AUC from internal validation was 0.706, indicating satisfactory model stability. Our study illustrated the severity of NMC abnormality was significantly associated with systemic inflammatory burdens (PLR, PAR, SII) and core indicators of T-cell activation and dysfunction (IL-2R and Th17/Treg ratio).

items.titleZh: 类风湿关节炎中甲襞微血管异常与全身炎症或Th17/Treg失调的关联
items.abstractZh: 本研究旨在探讨类风湿关节炎（RA）患者甲襞微循环（NMC）的异常特征，并进一步分析这些异常与常见全身炎症指标或关键免疫调节细胞亚群Th17/Treg细胞之间的关联。这项横断面观察研究纳入120例RA患者作为RA组，以及60例性别和年龄匹配的健康个体作为健康对照（HC）组。使用NMC显微镜评估NMC状态，并收集临床数据。采用Spearman相关分析评估NMC异常与炎症或免疫指标之间的关系。使用Lasso回归和随机森林模型筛选关键预测因子。采用受试者工作特征（ROC）曲线评估Th17/Treg比值对中重度NMC异常的诊断效能，并通过Hosmer-Lemeshow检验、校准曲线和决策曲线分析（DCA）验证拟合优度和临床实用性。采用Bootstrap方法进行内部验证。与HC组相比，RA组交叉毛细血管袢数量、形态评分、血流模式评分、血管周围评分和NMC总分更高，但血流速度更低。Spearman相关分析显示，NMC总分与血小板与淋巴细胞比值（PLR）（p=0.028）、血小板与红细胞比值（PAR）（p=0.037）、全身免疫炎症指数（SII）（p=0.009）和白细胞介素-2R（IL-2R）（p=0.046）呈正相关。NMC总分>4定义为中重度NMC异常。Lasso回归和随机森林模型确定Th17/Treg比值是该亚组的唯一独立相关因素，曲线下面积（AUC）为0.708。Hosmer-Lemeshow检验和校准曲线证实了良好的拟合优度，DCA曲线证实了该模型具有显著的临床获益。内部验证的平均AUC为0.706，表明模型稳定性令人满意。我们的研究阐明了NMC异常的严重程度与全身炎症负担（PLR、PAR、SII）以及T细胞活化和功能障碍的核心指标（IL-2R和Th17/Treg比值）显著相关。

items.title: Systemic lupus erythematosus associated with paroxysmal nocturnal hemoglobinuria: a case report and literature review highlighting the clinical significance of small PNH clones.
items.abstract: Systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) and paroxysmal nocturnal hemoglobinuria (PNH) represent distinct disorders linked by complement pathway dysregulation, yet their co-occurrence remains poorly characterized. We present a 42-year-old woman with newly diagnosed SLE exhibiting persistent cytopenia and Coombs-negative hemolysis, in whom high-sensitivity flow cytometry identified GPI-deficient clones consistent with PNH. Following treatment for SLE, she showed clinical improvement with stable small granulocyte PNH clone during more than 2 years of follow-up. Systematic literature review of seven additional cases reveals that SLE-associated PNH manifests heterogeneously, with thrombotic events occurring in 37.5% (3/8) of patients and detectable hemolysis in 87.5% (7/8). Notably, our analysis challenges the conventional view that small PNH clones (<10% granulocytes) are clinically insignificant - two such cases demonstrated biochemical evidence of hemolysis. These findings suggest that even small PNH clones may contribute to clinical hemolysis in SLE patients through autoimmune complement activation. This observation has immediate clinical relevance, as it justifies PNH screening in SLE patients with unexplained cytopenia or Coombs-negative hemolysis, and the management should be guided by clinical phenotype rather than clone size alone.

items.title: Hoarseness as an Early Manifestation of Granulomatosis with Polyangiitis: A Case Highlighting Diagnostic Challenges.
items.abstract: Granulomatosis with polyangiitis (GPA) is a systemic necrotizing small-vessel vasculitis that commonly involves the upper and lower respiratory tracts and kidneys and is potentially life-threatening. Early manifestations may be subtle and misleading, resulting in delayed diagnosis and treatment. Laryngeal involvement, particularly presenting as isolated dysphonia, remains an underrecognized and easily overlooked feature. We report a 77-year-old man with a history of lymphoma and previous lung cancer in remission who presented with six weeks of progressive hoarseness, shortness of breath, profound weight loss, and constitutional symptoms. On presentation, he was found to have multifocal pulmonary opacities, acute kidney injury with active urinary sediment, and systemic inflammation. The constellation of symptoms and his complex medical history created a diagnostic challenge. A unifying diagnosis emerged only after serologic testing revealed positive cytoplasmic anti-neutrophil cytoplasmic antibodies (C-ANCA) and anti-elevated proteinase-3 (PR3) antibodies. Renal biopsy confirmed pauci-immune crescentic glomerulonephritis consistent with GPA. Prompt initiation of pulse-dose corticosteroids and rituximab resulted in rapid clinical improvement. This case underscores dysphonia, which may represent an early and critical clue to airway involvement, preceding fulminant multisystem disease. Recognition of this presentation is essential, as diagnostic delay may lead to irreversible organ damage, whereas timely immunosuppressive therapy can be rapidly life-saving and organ-preserving.

items.titleZh: 声音嘶哑作为肉芽肿性多血管炎的早期表现：一例突出诊断挑战的病例
items.abstractZh: 肉芽肿性多血管炎（GPA）是一种系统性坏死性小血管炎，常累及上、下呼吸道和肾脏，可能危及生命。早期表现可能隐匿且具有误导性，导致诊断和治疗延迟。喉部受累，特别是表现为孤立性发声困难，仍是一个未被充分认识且易被忽视的特征。我们报告一例77岁男性，有淋巴瘤病史和既往肺癌缓解史，表现为进行性声音嘶哑、气短、显著体重减轻和全身症状持续六周。就诊时，发现其有多灶性肺部阴影、伴活动性尿沉渣的急性肾损伤以及全身性炎症。症状组合及其复杂病史构成了诊断挑战。仅在血清学检测显示胞浆型抗中性粒细胞胞浆抗体（C-ANCA）和抗蛋白酶3（PR3）抗体升高后，才得出统一诊断。肾活检证实为符合GPA的寡免疫新月体性肾小球肾炎。及时启动大剂量皮质类固醇和利妥昔单抗治疗后，临床症状迅速改善。本病例强调了发声困难可能代表气道受累的早期关键线索，先于暴发性多系统疾病出现。识别这一表现至关重要，因为诊断延迟可能导致不可逆的器官损伤，而及时的免疫抑制治疗可迅速挽救生命并保护器官。

items.title: Eruptive Disseminated Superficial Porokeratosis and Multiple Dermatofibromas in a Patient with Systemic Lupus Erythematosus under Belimumab Therapy: A Case Report.
items.abstract: There have been several reports on non-actinic disseminated superficial porokeratosis in association with autoimmune diseases, malignant disorders, or immunosuppressive/immunomodulatory therapies. A 36-year-old female with systemic lupus erythematosus developed eruptive disseminated superficial porokeratosis on the lower legs, which appeared and increased in number after belimumab therapy was started. Physical examination showed 40 brownish superficial round plaques with slightly elevated borders on the bilateral lower legs. Histopathology revealed a narrow stack of parakeratotic corneocytes (cornoid lamella), compatible with porokeratosis. In addition, a total of 6 brownish, firm dermal nodules were observed on the thigh and lower back, which appeared a few years after the development of porokeratosis. Histopathological examination revealed dermatofibroma. To the best of our knowledge, there have been no reports of multiple porokeratosis under belimumab therapy. Biologic therapy may be associated with epigenetic changes in the candidate gene variation.

items.titleZh: 贝利木单抗治疗的系统性红斑狼疮患者出现爆发性播散性浅表性汗孔角化症和多发性皮肤纤维瘤：一例病例报告
items.abstractZh: 已有数篇关于非光化性播散性浅表性汗孔角化症与自身免疫性疾病、恶性肿瘤或免疫抑制/免疫调节治疗相关的报道。一名36岁女性系统性红斑狼疮患者出现爆发性播散性浅表性汗孔角化症，累及双下肢，这些皮损在开始贝利木单抗治疗后出现并增多。体格检查显示双下肢有40个褐色浅表性圆形斑块，边缘轻微隆起。组织病理学检查显示一窄堆角化不全的角质形成细胞（角化不全层），符合汗孔角化症。此外，在大腿和下背部观察到共6个褐色、质硬的真皮结节，这些结节在汗孔角化症出现数年后出现。组织病理学检查显示为皮肤纤维瘤。据我们所知，尚无关于贝利木单抗治疗下出现多发性汗孔角化症的报道。生物治疗可能与候选基因变异中的表观遗传改变有关。
